programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective. But all great detectives need a mystery to solve! One quickly comes his way when an animal nibbles on one of Baby Bop's healthy snacks.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A creepy spider inspires Barney to tell the story of “The Reluctant Dragon.”

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play It Safe!
programme.desc: It's always fun to share a day with Barney—but it's also important to learn how to "play it safe!" Baby Bop, wanting to be a good helper, has been attaching adhesive strips to her frustrated (and uninjured) brother, BJ.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Ahora Mismo!
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ wants to learn Terry's fancy basketball moves. After some advice from Barney, BJ has fun while doing his best! On a campout, Baby Bop sees a falling star and wants to return it to the sky.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. Everyone is anxiously awaiting Mrs. Matuma’s Harambee Dance Troupe to arrive.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Making a Move
programme.desc: Welcome to the neighborhood! Anna has just moved to the neighborhood and is missing her old friends. Barney and his friends help her discover that moving is an adventure with new places to explore and new friends to meet.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: At Home in the Park
programme.desc: The children work together to make a bird house. They are happy to learn that the bird will have lots of company; many animals make their homes in the park too!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Coming on Strong
programme.desc: Exercise is good for everybody and every body! From running to touching toes to jumping jacks to some favorite songs and games, Barney and his friends grow strong while having fun with exercise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff can’t find his drumsticks anywhere. Barney helps Baby Bop explore many different jobs.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: You Can Count on Me
programme.desc: Barney helps his friends discover just how fun numbers can be by taking them on a number hunt in the park. Baby Bop delights in sharing her favorite number and the kids discover that numbers can be found everywhere.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Imagine That!
programme.desc: While Baby Bop and BJ are pretending to be pirates, Barney creates a magical island for their fantastic adventure. Together they discover ways to have fun while playing dress up, pretending, and being silly.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Friends the Doctor
programme.desc: Time for a check-up! Barney helps his friends discover the world of doctors and dentists as they learn about healthy habits like brushing teeth, getting checkups, eating healthy foods and getting exercise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When she finds out that Daniel is going on a trip the next day, Baby Bop wants to go on a trip as well. Everyone decides to pretend to travel the same way Daniel will travel.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When some of the children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race./When BJ starts to feel sick after eating too many sweets, he lies down in hopes of feeling better.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Tea-riffic Manners
programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: On the Road Again
programme.desc: Barney and his friends have a "wheel good fun" day learning about cars. Barney creates a colorful, kid-size car, the dinos learn about seatbelt safety, and everyone discovers there are many different styles of cars.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Stop! Go!
programme.desc: After playing with "Stop" and "Go" signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own! Meanwhile, in the caboose, Barney and the kids enjoy a costume parade, a game of "Musical Stop & Go," and some very vigorous body movement.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: I'm A Builder
programme.desc: When Baby Bop wonders about the noises she hears, Barney explains that the sounds are from big trucks and machines at a nearby construction site. This inspires BJ to build something himself—a wind-up toy robot.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Big Brother Rusty
programme.desc: Barney's excited to find out that Rusty's family is adopting a new baby girl from China; however, Rusty feels differently. He's not sure if he's going to be a good brother, and he doesn't know much about China.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Good Egg
programme.desc: When the kids find a mysterious, colorful egg in the park, Barney takes them on a trip to Kenya to try to find out what kind of animal could have laid the egg.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Everybody's Got Feelings
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and BJ learn that everyone has feelings—happy, sad, angry—and sometimes all those feelings can be experienced in just one day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an Art Show project that Melanie has made. A Park Kid named Myra has decided she doesn't like her name.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop can't find anybody to play with her. When the others see her feeling sad, they decide to play whatever she wants to play. The dinos and kids are planning a camp-out at the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A World of Friends
programme.desc: The children learn about many different countries while experiencing an "International Fair" on the playground.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Baby Brother
programme.desc: Barney reminds Baby Bop and BJ that although babies start out little, they grow fast. Through pretend play, favorite songs and fun games, they learn about the many ways we grow every day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids take imaginary trips to different countries with the magical caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Caring Hearts
programme.desc: A special project provides the perfect opportunity for Barney, Baby Bop and BJ to learn about love and relationships the "heart" way as they make a "Friends and Family Tree."

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Early Bird Special
programme.desc: Vintage Shooting Star carnival game; professional Mixed Martial Arts octagon fighting cage.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Knuckle Dust
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: A Screenshot to Santa
programme.desc: In this holiday family film, two sisters left home alone on December 23rd overcome their sibling rivalry as they stave off would-be intruders.

programme.title: K9 Christmas: Scoot & Kassie's Christmas Adventure
programme.desc: Kassie rescues Scoot, a former K-9 police dog, who becomes her best friend. But when two men turn up to work at the bank that Kassie's dad (Luke Perry) manages she finds out they are crooks with plans to get their hands on all the money and ruin Christmas

programme.title: Christmas For Three
programme.desc: When a successful bachelor suddenly finds himself as the guardian of a 10 year old boy, he leans on the smart and beautiful social worker for help, only to fall in love with the woman who turned his life upside down.

programme.title: Enchanted Christmas
programme.desc: When she left Utah as a young widow, Laura Trudeau left behind her father, her love of dance -- and an old heartbreak. Now, she must return home to spearhead the renovation of a derelict hotel.

programme.title: You Can’t Fight Christmas
programme.desc: Interior designer Leslie Major loves all things Christmas. When she meets handsome Edmund James, she quickly learns he thinks the festivities are frivolous and superficial.

programme.title: It's Christmas Carol!
programme.desc: Inspired by the Charles Dickens classic A Christmas Carol, It’s Christmas Carol! tells the story of a driven, heartless, publishing executive, Carol Huffman, who on Christmas Eve is visited by the ghost of her former boss, Eve.

programme.title: A Very Corgi Christmas
programme.desc: Laura, a single mom meets a fellow single dad Ben, who enlists her help in taking care of a cute corgi puppy he plans to give to his daughter at Christmas. Through all the chaos, Lauren gets the chance to finally experience the holiday spirit.

programme.title: Grumpy Cat's Worst Christmas Ever
programme.desc: Grumpy Cat is an Internet meme sensation with over 6 million Facebook friends, who has graced the cover of New York Magazine, is the spokescat for Friskies, appeared on American Idol and the MTV Movie Awards.

programme.title: All I Want For Christmas
programme.desc: One Christmas a boy wishes he could change places and his dream comes true! But he soon discovers that without his parents and friends it's actually a curse. The only problem is - can he reverse his disastrous wish and get his family back again.

programme.title: This is Our Christmas
programme.desc: When a spoiled Beverly Hills teenager needs to be taught a lesson she is sent to the local ski-town, by her guardian angel mother to help save her aunt's failing bakery and learn the importance of helping others.

programme.title: Finding Mrs. Claus
programme.desc: When Mrs. Claus (Mira Sorvino) feels neglected by her less than attentive husband (Will Sasso), she goes to Las Vegas to help a little girl with her Christmas wish.

programme.desc: Amber and Gary get ready for Leah's first day of school, while Catelynn continues to struggle with her anxiety and depression.

programme.desc: To keep Matt's son sober, Amber and Matt invite him to move in. Farrah visits Derek's family, but quickly returns home to deal with issues. Catelynn and Tyler attempt to celebrate their first year of marriage, but worry that they not see Carly.

programme.desc: Gary reluctantly asks Amber for help with Leah when Kristina has a family emergency. Maci gets to know Ryan's new girlfriend better, while Catelynn and Tyler discover they're still not ready to move into their new home.

programme.title: NEW: Teen Mom OG

programme.title: NEW Teen Mom UK
programme.desc: Heartbroken Chloe gets some advice she doesn't want to hear. Amber and Ste come to blows. The honeymoon period is over for Megan and new mum Emma tries to enjoy her 18th. (S7, ep3)

programme.title: NEW Teen Mom UK
programme.desc: Chloe argues with Sue over getting back with Jordan. Emma defends Nasseh. Amber's finding motherhood harder the second time round while Megan throws a birthday party. (S7, ep5)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Ashley
programme.desc: Ashley is a pregnant high school senior from Texas with no baby daddy weighing in, and a family encouraging her to choose adoption. But when the time comes, what will she decide?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Unseen Moments 2

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Reunion
programme.desc: Dr. Drew hosts an emotional finale as the teen mothers from the latest series share a stage, coming together with their boyfriends & parents to talk about the issues they face.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jordan
programme.desc: Jordan and her sister were models and best friends until Jordan's pregnancy put all that on hold. Now her boyfriend and her sister are competing to be her number one.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jennifer
programme.desc: After abandoning sports and losing her friends, Jennifer has to battle with her over-protective parents to accept her boyfriend before she gives birth to twin boys.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jamie
programme.desc: Raised by a single mum, Jamie is a straight A student with big plans for the future. But after getting pregnant she struggles to mould her immature boyfriend into the father she never had.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Danielle
programme.desc: After following her mum's footsteps by becoming a teen mum, Danielle strives to prove she can do things differently. But she soon learns she needs help managing school, a job and a baby.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Cleondra
programme.desc: Regarded as the most likely to succeed in her family, Cleondra shocks everyone by getting pregnant so young. Now she faces the tough decision to leave home and move in with her boyfriend.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kayla
programme.desc: Kayla's anorexia comes back full-force when she is pregnant. While struggling to put looks aside, Kayla realizes that the person she has always relied on, her mother, refuses to support her.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Izabella
programme.desc: After hiding her pregnancy for eight months, Izabella is forced to reconsider who her true friends are. She then risks her family ties when her boyfriend betrays their trust.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kianna
programme.desc: With an immature boyfriend and a distant mum, Kianna wants more stability for her baby and considers adoption. When no one supports her decision, she must figure out how to be a good parent.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Taylor
programme.desc: Taylor's mum wants her to choose adoption, but Taylor and her boyfriend Nathan feel that they can overcome the challenges of being teen parents.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Allie
programme.desc: A Jersey girl is stuck in Texas after moving in with her boyfriend's dysfunctional family, Allie needs to decide whether to raise her baby in an unstable environment or without a dad.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Reunion
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts an emotional finale as ten teen mothers share a stage to come together with their boyfriends and parents and talk about the issues they face.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Where Are They Now?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Adoption Special
programme.desc: Dr. Drew goes in depth and explores the adoption stories of Teen Mom's Catelynn and Tyler, and 16 and Pregnant's Ashley.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: We catch up with the girls of 16 And Pregnant to find where they are now.

programme.desc: The team suspect that a woman's death might be the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY - NEW EPISODES: Life Sentence
programme.desc: After a hail of gunfire tears through the crime lab, Mac becomes part of a vendetta.

programme.title: CSI: NY - NEW EPISODES: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: Mac tries to find a little girl who has been missing since 2002.

programme.title: CSI: NY - NEW EPISODES: Indelible

programme.title: CSI: NY - NEW EPISODES
programme.desc: Danny and the team investigate when a young woman's body is found in a Ferrari.

programme.title: CSI: NY - NEW EPISODES: Officer Involved

programme.title: CSI: New York - NEW EPISODES!: Seth and Apep
programme.desc: Mac and the team partner with D.B. Russell to outsmart Christine’s kidnappers before they run out of time to save her life.

programme.title: CSI: New York - NEW EPISODES!: Blood Actually

programme.title: CSI: New York - NEW EPISODES!: Today is Life

programme.title: CSI: New York - NEW EPISODES!: The 34th Floor
programme.desc: The newest CSI New York team of investigators’ team members is welcomed by stumbling upon a woman murdered in the NYPD crime lab building.

programme.title: CSI: New York - NEW EPISODES!: Unfriendly Chat
programme.desc: When a young woman appears to be strangled while in a live online chat that Adam witnesses the CSIs must determine if it was real or a hoax.

programme.title: CSI: New York - NEW EPISODES!: Damned if You Do

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Thin Bluefin Line
programme.desc: There is a narrow margin separating the top four boats and only two weeks left in the season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Final Fishdown
programme.desc: In the last week of the Atlantic bluefin tuna season, the closest race in Wicked Tuna history is a tossup among four top contenders.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Bite is On
programme.desc: Meet the fleet, as peak season begins and the adrenaline rush of \\"monstah\\" hunting hits Gloucester.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Payback's a Fish
programme.desc: After going bust on his last trip and coming home empty-handed, Marciano of Hard Merchandise now wrestles with the trials of being a husband and father who has to be away from home so often.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Weekend Warriors
programme.desc: Tuna.com continues its winning streak, catching two fish in one day while the rest of the fleet struggles to even find a spot to fish in between the weekend recreational boaters.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Size Matters
programme.desc: Meet Kevin and the Christina, a boat that gets its own real-life fish story when it snags an 1,100-pound \\"monstah\\" right out of the gate.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Greed, Ego & Jealousy
programme.desc: After watching the Christina catch the biggest tuna of the season, the uber-competitive Captain Dave of the Tuna.com is obsessed with beating the record, and catching a fish bigger than 1,075 lbs!

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mann gegen Sturm
programme.desc: Marciano, captain of Hard Merchandise, risks the elements to hook a giant bluefin and finds himself with boat trouble in the midst of the storm.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mutiny at Sea
programme.desc: A mixture of bad luck and mutiny brews in this tumultuous episode of Wicked Tuna. Tensions erupt on New England's top tuna boat, Tuna.Com, when Captain Dave and Paul get into a heated confrontation that causes Paul to quit!

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Grudge Match
programme.desc: With just two weeks left until the end of tuna fishing season, Bounty Hunter gains a new deckhand.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Captain Ralph in Not
programme.desc: A hard season with little money to show has taken its toll on the crew of the Odysea, leading Captain Ralph to lash out at his first mate Pirate.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Good to the Last Bite
programme.desc: As the final week of tuna fishing begins, the Hard Merchandise, the Bounty Hunter, the Tuna.Com and the Odysea steam out together, each captain vowing to catch the biggest tuna before the season ends.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Bite is On
programme.desc: Meet the fleet, as peak season begins and the adrenaline rush of \\"monstah\\" hunting hits Gloucester.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Payback's a Fish
programme.desc: After going bust on his last trip and coming home empty-handed, Marciano of Hard Merchandise now wrestles with the trials of being a husband and father who has to be away from home so often.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Weekend Warriors
programme.desc: Tuna.com continues its winning streak, catching two fish in one day while the rest of the fleet struggles to even find a spot to fish in between the weekend recreational boaters.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Size Matters
programme.desc: Meet Kevin and the Christina, a boat that gets its own real-life fish story when it snags an 1,100-pound \\"monstah\\" right out of the gate.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Greed, Ego & Jealousy
programme.desc: After watching the Christina catch the biggest tuna of the season, the uber-competitive Captain Dave of the Tuna.com is obsessed with beating the record, and catching a fish bigger than 1,075 lbs!

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mann gegen Sturm
programme.desc: Marciano, captain of Hard Merchandise, risks the elements to hook a giant bluefin and finds himself with boat trouble in the midst of the storm.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mutiny at Sea
programme.desc: A mixture of bad luck and mutiny brews in this tumultuous episode of Wicked Tuna. Tensions erupt on New England's top tuna boat, Tuna.Com, when Captain Dave and Paul get into a heated confrontation that causes Paul to quit!

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Fatal Student Night (Ste´phane Kameugne Case)
programme.desc: On December 24, 2008, the body of Stéphane Kameugne was fished out from a canal in Châlons-en-Champagne. The young man had been missing for two weeks and no one had seen him since the evening of his graduation ceremony from his engineering school
programme.sub-title: A Fatal Student Night (Ste´phane Kameugne Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Very Strange Suicide (Muller case)
programme.desc: Police in Strasbourg receive a startling emergency call from Doctor Jean-Louis Muller, a forensic pathologist well known in the region.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Willy Pomonti Case
programme.desc: Willy Pomonti, a retired architect, is found savagely murdered in his opulent villa in La Celle-Saint-Cloud, near Paris. It soon becomes clear that the man has been tortured prior to death.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: (Ruth Légeret Case) Bloody Christmas next to the Leman lake
programme.desc: On January 4, 2006, Ruth Légeret was found dead in the middle of a pool of blood at her luxurious property in Vevey, Switzerland. Next to her was the lifeless body of her friend, Marina Studer. Who could have killed these two simple and wealthy widows?
programme.sub-title: (Ruth Légeret Case) Bloody Christmas next to the Leman lake

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Christophe Lejard Case
programme.desc: The lifeless body of Christophe Lejard is found by his son just metres from their home. The man was shot in the head as he was getting into his car to go to work. An execution, which at first glance doesn't square with the profile of a quiet family man.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Drost Notthoff Case
programme.desc: On September 11th 2011, in Èze, near Monaco, the owner of a luxury villa discovers the lifeless hanging body of his tenant, a rich German businessman.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Dying to Be Young
programme.desc: A healthy 53-year-old woman is found dead in bed. After performing an autopsy and taking blood and tissue samples, Dr. G cannot find the cause of death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Bruised And Battered
programme.desc: A neighbor hears odd sounds coming from the next apartment. When the police arrive, they find a man bruised and dead. When all signs point to foul play, it’s up to Dr. G to find proof of murder.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Degrees of Death
programme.desc: Dr. G suspects that someone is responsible for a vagrant's unusual death. She’ll only discover the truth by finding answers to the strange events surrounding this curious case.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Derailed
programme.desc: A train passenger behaves oddly en route to Arizona and then disappears. The next day his bloodied body is found in Texas. Dr. G attempts to piece together this bizarre tragedy.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Dr. G. has just graduated from medical school and is set to begin her first job as an M.E. in Jacksonville, Florida when a high-profile case challenges her to use her newly acquired skills.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Death on the Road
programme.desc: A man is found dead in a motel room due to multiple shotgun wounds. Dr. G proves the scene isn’t what it seems.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: A Lingering Question
programme.desc: When the husband, Tao Chen, is shot to death by his wife Jun, she claims she pulled the trigger in self-defense when a drunken Tao came after her with a gun.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Deadly Dive
programme.desc: A train engineer panics when he spots a man lying on the tracks. He blows the whistle, but the train can’t stop in time. It’s up to Dr. G to piece together how Andy Santana died.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: John Myatt and John Drew – The Art World Con
programme.desc: The pair pulled off the biggest art con of the 20th Century, passing off works painted by Myatt as genuine works by famous artists.
programme.sub-title: John Myatt and John Drew – The Art World Con

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Nick Gage – The Lying Lothario
programme.desc: Fantasist Gage preyed on lonely women he would meet on dating sites.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Mark Hatton – aka Alex de Rothschild – The Bogus Banker
programme.desc: Posing as a member of the Rothschild banking dynasty, he duped a string of women in the UK and US.
programme.sub-title: Mark Hatton – aka Alex de Rothschild – The Bogus Banker

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Robert Hendy-Freegard – The Terrorist Trickster
programme.desc: Dubbed “The Most Evil Conman Ever” by the British press, Hendy-Freegard terrorized victims into believing they were terrorist targets.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Bedroom Strangler
programme.desc: Women are being attacked in their beds at night. Police are baffled as to how this intruder is gaining access to apartments sometimes more than 15 stories up.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Victoria Day Shooter
programme.desc: On a single rain-soaked night during the Victoria Day weekend, police are called to the scene of three very similar crimes.

programme.title: Crime Stories: David Snow: The House Hermit
programme.desc: A young Vancouver woman is tied to a tree and sexually assaulted for 9 straight days just yards away from the busiest highway in Canada.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Menthol Murderer
programme.desc: A week-long search for a missing 10-yr-old Indiana girl ends sadly with her body being discovered in a nearby stream.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Elderly Executioners
programme.desc: Ray and Faye Copeland would become America‚an oldest couple on death row when a simple livestock scam escalated into murder.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Elusive Rapist

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Homocidal Drifter

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Thierry Paulin

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Joachim Kroll
programme.desc: Joachim Kroll murdered at least thirteen people during a span of over twenty years.

programme.title: A&E After Dark: Episode 7

programme.title: Scorpion: Kenny and the Jet

programme.title: Scorpion: A Lie in the Sand

programme.title: Scorpion: Father's Day
programme.desc: A case gets personal for Team Scorpion when three convicts break out of prison and one of them is a brilliant hacker who was forced to help the others steal billions online.

programme.title: Scorpion: Risky Business

programme.title: Scorpion: Kill Screen

programme.title: Scorpion: Charades

programme.title: Scorpion: Forget Me Nots

programme.title: Scorpion: Love Boat
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes undercover on a cruise ship to locate and disable deadly stolen rockets.

programme.title: Scorpion: Going South
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Mexico when a tech billionaire hires them to rescue his kidnapped daughter.

programme.title: Scorpion: Once Bitten, Twice Die
programme.desc: When a conflict in Eastern Europe threatens to escalate, Team Scorpion is called on to help facilitate secret peace talks to prevent World War III.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Graduation Exercises
programme.desc: Trying to show how effective they are without their teacher's direction, Slipstorm and Jetstorm inadvertently put Drift in harm's way and must come to their master's aid before he is destroyed by STOCKADE.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Decepticon Island, Part 1
programme.desc: With the Bee Team and the Away Team reunited, the Autobots, joined by an old friend, locate and investigate Decepticon Island, and unexpectedly find Steeljaw in charge of an army of Decepticons!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Decepticon Island, Part 2
programme.desc: Badly outnumbered and trapped on Decepticon Island, the Autobots desperately search for a way to take out Steeljaw and put his army of fugitives in stasis, but friction between Bumblebee and Optimus could put the mission – and all of Earth – at risk!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: History Lessons
programme.desc: Bumblebee's guided tour of Earth brings the Bee Team to Optimus Prime's old base, but Sideswipe doesn't have any use for history.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Strongarm's Big Score

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Pretzel Logic
programme.desc: Not wanting the overaggressive Dinobot to compromise his team's quest to capture the scavenger Decepticons and their Mini-­‐Cons, Bee sends Grimlock on a “solo mission” to the Alps.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Mighty Big Trouble
programme.desc: The Scavengers find a most unexpected relic, even as their mysterious Mini-­‐Cons make their escape and their even more unexpected pursuer, Starscream, arrives on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Mini–Con Madness
programme.desc: Starscream gloats over his impending victory, unaware that Optimus Prime has arrived to help the remaining Autobots. After being surprised by, and taken over by, the Mini-­‐Cons, the heroes ally with the Mini-­‐Cons, who share their secrets with the team.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Worthy
programme.desc: Starscream tries to absorb the power of six of the Mini-­‐Cons, but needs the seventh to obtain the ultimate power he craves for his revenge.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: King of the Hill –Part 1
programme.desc: Bumblebee, still relaxing after the Autobots' triumph over Starscream, feels his team can tackle any issue that might come up.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: King of the Hill –Part 2
programme.desc: Bumblebee struggles to bring his out-of-practice team to combat readiness as they square off against the missiles and oil barrel traps of Stunticon Heat seeker.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Defrosted
programme.desc: Grimlock begs to learn new fighting methods from reluctant “teacher” Drift –but Grimlock's initial attempts to put Drift's lessons into action fall comically flat.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Blurred
programme.desc: While recovering one of Windblade's hidden caches, the Autobots run into Rescue Bot Blurr.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: The Bee Team captures a Skunkticonwho's obsessively guarding a strange Sphere-shaped artifact. The curious Sphere bears a more than passing resemblance to a mythical relic that can reveal the location of the lost city of Doradus.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Bee Cool
programme.desc: BLURR continues on as SIDESWIPE's intern, while BUMBLEBEE discovers a replacement Decepticon Hunter exists in Windblade's hidden cache on the island town of WEST ROCK CITY. Unfortunately, Stunticons DRAG STRIP and WILDCHASE find the cache first.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Great Divide
programme.desc: When Stunticon Drag Strip steals a powerful Cybertronian artifact known as a Gravitic Adjuster, the Bee Team gives chase but are caught in an explosion that once again fuses them into the Ultra Bee Team Combiner (UBTC).

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Get a Clue
programme.desc: A string of mysterious explosives thefts leave the Bee Team flummoxed, but Strongarm is convinced that there's a criminal mastermind at work.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: DRIFT's former mentor SHADOW RAKER, a Fagin-like thief, has come to Earth to reclaim what he believes to be rightfully his — JETSTORM and SLIPSTREAM!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Disordered Personalities
programme.desc: After Fixit's latest attempt at combining the team, the Autobots ends up swapping bodies! They then discover that the Stunticons have entered the local Grand Prix, assuming that whomever wins will be crowned the literal “ruler of the roads.”

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Strongarm's best friend from her time at the Police Academy, Chicane, shows up at the Scrapyard.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Golden Knight
programme.desc: When Fixit discovers an ancient Cybertronian signal originating on an island off the coast of England, he begs Bumblebee to tag along on the investigation.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Fastest Bot Alive!
programme.desc: When FIXIT attempts to sample GRIMLOCK's DNA for a bot-combiner experiment, his Particle Sampler instead invests the once-slow Dinobot with dangerous super speed!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Railroad Rage
programme.desc: In his haste to polish Drift's Katana, Slipstream accidentally uses an acid that wrecks it. Before he can make repairs, the Bee Team races off to stop the Stunticons from stealing a high-tech train's engine.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Combine and Conquer
programme.desc: Bee insists his team begin to follow his orders more rigorously, but this new micromanaging strategy shows cracks when Motormaster attacks a Meteor Deflector facility.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Moon Breaker
programme.desc: The Bee Team is about to embark on a mission to the moon to retrieve the last remaining cache item, when Optimus Prime arrives to recruit Drift for a special assignment.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Exiles
programme.desc: The Autobots are attacked by Steeljaw and his pack and driven from the Scrapyard. In the process, Sideswipe is nearly left behind, drudging up bad memories of his days alone on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Breathing Room
programme.desc: With quarters cramped in the cavern, Bumblebee and Fixit scout for a new living arrangement. Sideswipe and Strongarm venture out as well, and are trapped by Clampdown inside a shipping container.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Prepare for Departure
programme.desc: Grimlock goofs off while on monitor duty and misses a signal alert at the Nuclear Waste Disposal site. The Bee Team still gets there in time to engage Steeljaw and his Pack, but are waylaid in a crevasse and the Decepticons get away with nuclear material.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Prisoner Principles
programme.desc: When the BEE TEAM investigates a Decepticon signal near a nuclear power plant, they find QUILLFIRE and CLAMPDOWN. Quillfire escapes, but STRONGARM captures Clampdown. He reveals STEELJAW's plan to steal nuclear fuel rods from the power plant.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: Optimus Prime arrives to warn the Bee Team about a breach in the Shadow Zone.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Something He Ate
programme.desc: The Bee Teamers return to the Scrapyard with their Decepticon captives, and find the place completely trashed. Sideswipe, Strongarm, and Grimlock balk at being assigned clean-up duty, asserting that they're warriors, not janitors.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Sick as a Bot
programme.desc: The Autobots suffer serious malfunctions after the Decepticon WINGCODE exposes them to harmful nanoparticles in an attempt to get her claws on the team's stash of Energon Cubes.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Five Fugitives
programme.desc: The Bee Team is about to catch their nemesis Steeljaw when they are interrupted by Strongarm's old mentor DROPFORGE, who arrives from Cybertron with orders to arrest them.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Enemy of my Enemy
programme.desc: Unannounced, Optimus returns to the scrapyard with an All-Star team of Autobot allies: Ratchet, Windblade, and Jazz, as well as Drift and his Mini-Cons.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Freedom Fighters
programme.desc: Surrounded and outgunned on Cybertron, the Bee Team and Steeljaw are in danger of seeing their mission to overthrow the oppressive High Council go up in smoke.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transform And Roll Out! Part 1
programme.desc: The evil Decepticons have appeared in Detroit. With the all powerful Allspark, Megatron can use it to turn all of Earth's robots into Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transform And Roll Out! Part 2
programme.desc: While working on a space bridge, the Autobots and their leader, Optimus Prime, find the AllSpark. After an epic battle between their ship and Megatron, they crash land on Earth in the city of Detroit.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transform And Roll Out! Part 3
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots continue to fight off Megatron and the evil Decepticons. Eventually, the team assumes heroic roles in Detroit City.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Home Is Where The Spark Is
programme.desc: The Autobots must save Detroit from Starscream, when he kidnaps Bumblebee, Fanzone and Isaac Sumdac for ransom to get the AllSpark.
programme.sub-title: Home Is Where The Spark Is

programme.title: Survivorman: Canadian Rockies
programme.desc: Les is air dropped onto a snow covered peak in the Canadian Rockies. He has with him only a few readily salvageable items, among them a broken camcorder and tripod.

programme.title: Survivorman: Tonga
programme.desc: Les strands himself on purpose, accompanied by his long-time survival buddy Bob Wilson, on a deserted island in the Kingdom of Tonga.

programme.title: Survivorman: Arizona Desert
programme.desc: Riding a dirt bike out into the official middle of nowhere, Les simulates a break-down scenario. Half a gallon of water, a snack bar and his multi-tool are all he has with him for the next 7 days.

programme.title: Survivorman: Georgian Swamp
programme.desc: The swamplands of Georgia's Altamaha River Basin are all that one would expect of a primordial bog; dank, menacing, swimming with slithering creepy crawlies and of course, alligator infested.

programme.title: Survivorman: Northern Ontario
programme.desc: Temagami is home of some of the oldest rocks on the face of the planet, old growth pine forests, clear deep lakes, and boasts artifacts and stone drawings dating as far back as 6000 B.C.

programme.title: Survivorman: India
programme.desc: Les takes his survival skills to the Indian subcontinent, where he accidentally stakes out a shelter right in the heart of a tiger's territory.

programme.title: Survivorman: Labrador
programme.desc: Dog sledding is the way Les will get around the freezing north. Even though he brought along a survival kit, he is still without the crucial essentials needed to survive Labrador in the winter.

programme.title: Survivorman: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Les plants himself in Bigfoot hot spots across North America, collecting stories and experiences from Bigfoot believers, gathering and examining evidence to debunk the mysteries that surround this ancient legend.

programme.title: Survivorman: Incan O'ero High Priests
programme.desc: Les and crew climb to 16,000 ft up dangerous Mt. Sinkara to join 80,000 indigenous Andeans as they make their yearly pilgrimage to the holy site of Qollorit'i.

programme.title: Survivorman: Temagami Forest
programme.desc: Les returns to the oldest mountain ranges in North America, The forests of Ontario's Temagami, to survive for ten days with no food, no water, no shelter, no safety and no camera crew. Facing the dangers of packs of wolves and vigilant moose.

programme.title: Survivorman: Grenada Island
programme.desc: Les journeys to an active volcano chain found in the Grenadine Islands. Stranding himself on an uninhabited island called Frigate, Les is left to survive on his own.

programme.title: Survivorman: Alaska
programme.desc: As Stroud enters an ocean bay called "Taroka Arm" by sea kayak, there's only about four hours of twilight per day and he knows that Mother Nature is going to wreak havoc upon his internal clock.

programme.title: Survivorman: Legend of Klemtu Hill
programme.desc: There's a volcano in British Columbia where Bigfoot reports are in the hundreds. According to locals, a mysterious animal leaves tracks and even kills people. Les braves the dangers of this Bigfoot hotspot to find the truth behind these strange reports.

programme.title: Survivorman: Giants of the Forest
programme.desc: Les returns to the wilderness of remote Alberta to investigate evidence of Sasquatch activity. Armed with infrared camera and thermal imaging technology, Les investigates reports of Bigfoot sightings in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Survivorman: Peru Amazonian Shamans
programme.desc: Les will participate with the Huacharia Tribe as they perform ceremony in their daily lives to pay homage to the elements.

programme.title: Survivorman: MacGyverisms
programme.desc: This show features Les' best tips and tricks, the methods that Les has created over his 25-year career of surviving that he calls McGyverisms.

programme.title: Survivorman: Survivorman & Son Ecuador
programme.desc: Father and son embark on a photography expedition deep in the Ecuadorian jungle but when the tour guide doesn't return, Les and Logan must put their wills of survival to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Survivorman: Fighting To Survive
programme.desc: Les Stroud, TV's Survivorman, will teach Elias the ways of survival. However, he won't teach him everything he needs to know.

programme.title: Survivorman: Grenada Jungle
programme.desc: Les pits his jungle survival skills against the incredibly diverse mountain jungle terrain of Grenada's largest active mountain, Mt. St. Catherine.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: After a woman goes missing, her husband is the prime suspect, until key evidence found in a burned out car sheds new light on the case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators believe a sinister blood trail will lead them to a missing woman, but she's nowhere to be found. Soon fresh evidence crops up.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a young girl is found dead in her backyard, her parents tell the police that she was killed by the family dogs.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police use laser technology to discover the origins of an anonymous letter informing of a murder, and track down a suspect.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Marie Robards lost her father, and one year later, her moving performance in a high school play revealed she was harbouring a dark secret.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a young boy is killed in a mysterious fire, his mother is charged with arson, but she's determined to extinguish the accusations.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a man dies unexpectedly in the office of a noted California doctor, police begin what they think will be a routine investigation. What they find throws doubt on the identity of the dead man and raises questions about the doctor's role.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A forensic scientist uses his skills to preserve a footprint left in snow to help authorities nab two men suspected of robbing an Ontario couple and shooting the husband in the head.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When we think of looking for fingerprints at a crime scene, we generally think of hard objects that a perpetrator may have touched - a doorknob, a drinking glass - but a fabric? Is it possible that a piece of cloth could contain a fingerprint?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a six year old girl disappears from church during a Sunday service, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children in the church shadows. A psychological profile of the perpetrator lead investigators to taxi cab driver.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: At the end of a murder mystery event, a real death occurs. The death initially looks like an accident but forensic evidence suggests otherwise.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Whilst out riding with her husband, a woman dies in an apparent riding accident, but her husband doesn't appear as grief-stricken as he should be.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A twisted killer murdered prostitutes and left their bodies in plain sight. Evidence of treads and threads enable police to track him down.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A mother claims that an intruder murdered her two sons, but lacking a motive, police use blood-spatter analysis and behavioural profiling to reconstruct a different scenario.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: No body, no weapon, but no problem for a team of investigators who use forensics and detective work to prove a murder has taken place, and who did it.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: After a deadly and mysterious house fire kills two family members, investigators discover evidence that points to a cold-blooded plot.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A husband confesses to his wife's murder, only to be found not guilty a year later when evidence points to another.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A five-year-old girl disappeared from a Christmas party. The fibres on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor. A clothing catalogue provides a lead.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The search for the killer of two teenagers in Texas shows how behavioural studies and intuition, backed up by scientific testing, can lead to the right result.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1992, the residents of Seattle were living in fear of a serial arsonist who had set fire to more than 100 homes. Who was this pyromaniac and how did the police catch him?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 2002, the eyes of the world were on Virginia and Maryland, USA. A serial sniper was on the loose, killing innocent, unsuspecting citizens. Just how was he caught?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: For seven years, a trio of men robbed one bank after another. They always got away before the police arrived, and left no evidence behind. But the way they stood and the clothes they wore told a story, one that could be read by forensic scientists.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1984 a flurry of arson fires in California had authorities baffled. The discovery of a fingerprint points to a most unlikely suspect.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police discover blood stains on the inside and the outside of a crashed vehicle, leading them to believe that foul play is afoot.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A stockbroker was reported missing by his worried wife, and investigators discover clues in his abandoned car.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Evidence found at the scene of a malicious double murder points to a man with a criminal record. Will the investigators catch the killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Two bodies are discovered, shot to death in their car. The car windows were broken, but there's no sign of shattered glass.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators uncover clues such as distinctive boots and a sweet tooth, which lead to the murderer of a World War II veteran who was discovered dead in his home.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The sister of a dead woman that suffered from depression points investigators to a note that was left by her dead sibling.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A forensic geologist digs up evidence to the murderer of a model. The killer wasn't her boyfriend, as they initially thought.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In Delano, California, investigators discover a dead girl on desolate farmland. Mail box keys found on her person help them solve the mystery.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks - all fronted by an elderly couple.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest, authorities know immediately that they are dealing with experienced criminals. A tip leads them to the alleged perpetrators.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Railway Bridges
programme.desc: Railway bridges fascinate through different construction methods from masonry, truss-beam bridges to steel-concrete arch bridge. Heavier loads, faster speeds, more frequently: trains speed over bridges and the maintenance teams face ever larger challenges

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Moving Bridges
programme.desc: Moving Bridges: Exotic milestones on moveable infrastructure. Historically significant: the Kaiser Wilhelm Bridge and the Michigan Avenue bridge. Mechanically unique: the Pont Jacques, the Gateshead Millennium Bridge or the Scale Lane Bridge.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Suspension Bridges
programme.desc: Suspension bridges – impressively wide and stretched high over supporting cables or stay cables. The landscape-shaping icons: The superlative Golden Gate, Akashi Kaikyo, Aizaih, El Baluarte and Russky Bridge.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: UPS Worldport
programme.desc: What does it take to deliver millions of packages and documents every day right in time? You need a Giant Hub: UPS Worldport in Louisville is a technological marvel. It is the largest automated package handling facility in the world.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Moscow Metro
programme.desc: It is one of the biggest and busiest metro systems in the world: The Moscow Metro. During rush hour the trains are running every 90 seconds to transport around 9 million people daily – that makes 2.3 billion a year.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Rungis Food Market
programme.desc: Rungis International Market is the world's largest wholesale market for fresh produce. Fish, meat, fruits, vegetables, cheese and even fresh flowers are sold here every day in quantities so large an entire train station.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Munich Airport
programme.desc: The Munich based Franz Joseph Strauss Airport is rated the only 5-Star airport in Europe. And it is also one of Europe´s biggest hubs. An average 1.100 flights have to be taken care of every day, 44.6 million passengers chose Munich as destination.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Shinjuku Station
programme.desc: A look behind the scenes of the world’s busiest station: Shinjuku Station! Five separate train lines, almost three thousand passengers per minute and trains arriving every second.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Port of Rotterdam
programme.desc: The Port of Rotterdam is among the largest logistics centers in the world. With a handling capacity of about one million three hundred thousand tons – per day!

programme.title: Mega Transports: Power Generator
programme.desc: A three hundred and ninety ton giant on a daring journey: A team of German heavy-lift-specialists have to transport a generator from a disused coal plant to its new operation site 120 kilometers away.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Giant Antenna
programme.desc: South America. The chelonian Atacama Desert is home to the world's largest radio telescope Atacama Large Millimeter Array Observatory, also known as ALMA.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Biggest Containership
programme.desc: When the first ship of the brand-new OOCL-fleet gets underway, more cargo is moved at one time than anywhere else in the world and ever before.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Mining Truck
programme.desc: If a transporter needs to be transported, if 176 wheels aren't enough to carry its weight and if the load weighs twice as much as the transporter... Then it must be the mother of all mega transports!

programme.title: Mega Transports: Wind Park
programme.desc: A wind park needs to get from Europe to Asia. Over two thousand tons of highly sensitive and valuable cargo. On one of the world's largest heavy lift vessels.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Conveyance of the Norwegian Joy
programme.desc: Meyer Werft in Germany is one of the biggest shipbuilders in the world. But it's problem is as big as the ships it builds: the coast and sea are 50 kilometres away.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Superyachts
programme.desc: Transporting a ship by a ship - this becomes necessary when the super-rich want their super yacht available on the other side of the world, but do not want to sail it there themselves.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Drilling Rig
programme.desc: A brand-new oil rig, worth 500 million dollar, has to go from South Korea to Europe. The problem is that it is too gigantic for a heavy transport vessel. The solution is to tow it.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Gigantic Autoliner
programme.desc: A transport to the other side of the globe. The Höegh Trapper is the largest automobile transporter in the world. Two hundred meters long, thirty-six meters wide.

programme.desc: With candid dashboard camera footage of bungled arrests, kamikaze crooks and cop-based carnage of all shapes and sizes, Cops Uncut is the ultimate American police trooper blooper reel.
