programme.title: Under Arrest: Don't Fuzz Me
programme.desc: A landlord tenant dispute results in a stabbing, police are called to a break-and-enter in progress and a domestic dispute takes a bizarre twist.

programme.title: Under Arrest: Manitoba Eh
programme.desc: A woman calls the police when her intoxicated son tries to strangle her. An alley filled with drug paraphernalia is center stage for a police sting.

programme.title: Under Arrest: Top of the Line
programme.desc: A stolen pickup truck is chased at high speed, police conduct an undercover investigation of prostitution and a man threatens neighbors with a gun.

programme.title: Under Arrest: Magic Wallet
programme.desc: An impaired driver fights with police, a sex trade worker robs a customer and police seize a large quantity of drugs and cash.

programme.title: Under Arrest: IQ Test Fail
programme.desc: Partygoers attack police officers, a car thief is caught red-handed and divers recover a missing body.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation H2O
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens: Autumn East to West
programme.desc: An officer on Michigan's east side meets a driver on the road without a license and an officer on the state's west side patrols during a waterfowl hunt on a state game area.

programme.title: Wardens: Man-Made Fires
programme.desc: Conservation Officers on patrols during fall fishing season as well as spring turkey season encounter suspects that have set fires in conditions where they shouldn't have.

programme.title: Wardens: Whitetail Patrol Tactics
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers employ numerous tactics to enforce the state laws. Some of them include using aerial patrols to look out for illegal activitity as well as keeping an eye out for blinds on state land that have been in place too long.

programme.title: Wardens: Whitefish Rodeo Part 1
programme.desc: Conservation Officers fish in plain clothes to see if anglers are snagging fish.

programme.title: Wardens: Whitefish Rodeo Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2 of a night time patrol to stop anglers from keeping fish that are foul-hooked.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Coming Home
programme.desc: A noise complaint leads Andy and Swarek to an illegal warehouse party, and to an injured John Doe -- a homeless squatter whoʼs been stabbed in the warehouse

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Leap of Faith
programme.desc: When a gifted psychic - or, at the very least, a gifted conman - enters 15 Division to help find the missing witness in an organized-crime case, the officers are forced to come face-to-face with some of the hidden truths

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of a grad-student-turned escort, the officers discover a pattern of missing women. Since Gail fits the physical description of the victims, she is sent on an undercover sting at a high-end hotel

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Out Of Time
programme.desc: After the officers of 15 Division are forced to release a suspected predator, the grim discovery of the body of a missing girl reopens an unsolved case – bringing back Detective Luke Callaghan in from the Homicide Squad to oversee it.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Cold Comforts
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division are still reeling in the aftermath of the unexpected death of one of their colleagues. When they discover that a laptop has been stolen containing sensitive information, they set out to tie up several of open cases

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Rules
programme.desc: Itʼs “back to basics” for 15 Division when Staff Sergeant Frank Best decides itʼs time for his officers to get back on track

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Every Man
programme.desc: A seasonʼs worth of trials and tribulations come to a head during a frenzied night at the station when the distracted rookies improperly search a prisoner

programme.title: Rookie Blue: I Never
programme.desc: When a violent child abductor escapes from an emergency hospital visit, 15 Division goes on the hunt for the criminal -- only to discover that heʼs taken another young victim

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Surprises
programme.desc: After six months working undercover, Andy and Nick’s operation goes sideways when Nick, then Andy go missing. Meanwhile, a random arrest at 15 Division puts Sam Swarek and the other officers in the middle of the investigation-turned-rescue-mission

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Homecoming
programme.desc: On her first day back at 15 Division, Andy must work with Swarek to track down an ex convict determined to get his old life back at any cost. Andy realizes just how much has changed since she walked away from her old life six months ago

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Different, Not Better
programme.desc: Andy is partnered with Swarek’s new girlfriend, Officer Marlo Cruz. When they come face-to-face with an out of control EDP [Emotionally Disturbed Person], their differences are put to the test and one of them has to pull the trigger.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Kids Are Not Alright
programme.desc: Andy has her sights set on a much-needed long weekend. But when a routine highway check leads to the discovery of a teenage boy in the trunk of a car, Andy and Gail must convince him that no heartache lasts forever

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Poison Pill
programme.desc: After a messy drug arrest, Andy and Marlo are quarantined together. Meanwhile, 15 Division springs into emergency response mode in order to get the contaminated drugs off the streets before a deadly outbreak sweeps through the city.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Skeletons
programme.desc: When a young woman is reported missing, the officers of 15 Division soon discover a possible copycat connection to one of their division’s most distressing cases. With the clock ticking, Gail must face her worst fears..

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: When human bones found in a ravine open up a 15-year-old missing persons case, Swarek reunites with his old training officer to solve the case

programme.title: Rookie Blue: For Better, For Worse
programme.desc: Everyone at 15 Division, especially Andy, just wants a quick, smooth shift so they can get to Frank and Noelle’s wedding. But things get complicated when they get called to a hijacked casino bus full of senior citizens

programme.title: Rookie Blue: What I Lost
programme.desc: When Chris returns for a visit, his reunion takes a shocking turn when his son, Christian, is abducted while under the care of Andy and Nick

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Are Here
programme.desc: Near the end of shift, 15 Division busts a marijuana grow-op – a case that becomes Traci’s first homicide and forces Andy, Nick and Gail to work overtime

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deception
programme.desc: When a suspected pedophile is found beaten within an inch of his life, Andy discovers Marlo has been conducting a mania-fueled, off-hours “investigation”

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Under Fire
programme.desc: After Andy and Chloe take fire from an unseen shooter, the officers realize they are the targets of someone with a grudge against 15 Division

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules (Kellan Lutz) must use his formidable powers to fight his way back to his rightful kingdom.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Teenagers (Dacre Montgomery, Naomi Scott, RJ Cyler) who have been chosen to protect the world from aliens do it by morphing into superheroes and piloting giant robots.

programme.title: Jane Got a Gun
programme.desc: With help from her boozing ex-lover (Joel Edgerton), a woman (Natalie Portman) tries to defend her injured husband (Noah Emmerich) from a vengeful outlaw (Ewan McGregor) and his gang of killers in the Old West.

programme.title: Destroyer
programme.desc: As a young cop, Erin Bell went under cover to infiltrate a gang in the California desert -- with tragic results. When the gang leader re-emerges, Bell embarks on an obsessive quest to bring him to justice and make peace with her tortured past.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Teenagers (Dacre Montgomery, Naomi Scott, RJ Cyler) who have been chosen to protect the world from aliens do it by morphing into superheroes and piloting giant robots.

programme.title: Jane Got a Gun
programme.desc: With help from her boozing ex-lover (Joel Edgerton), a woman (Natalie Portman) tries to defend her injured husband (Noah Emmerich) from a vengeful outlaw (Ewan McGregor) and his gang of killers in the Old West.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Teenagers (Dacre Montgomery, Naomi Scott, RJ Cyler) who have been chosen to protect the world from aliens do it by morphing into superheroes and piloting giant robots.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules (Kellan Lutz) must use his formidable powers to fight his way back to his rightful kingdom.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: First of its Kind
programme.desc: Following Boone's confrontation with Hegel that left him severely injured, he was eliminated by Zo'or. Beckett who was impregnated by Hegel gives birth to a boy who immediately grows up to a man.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Avatus
programme.desc: Da'an looses his contact with the the Taelon Commonality. This causes him to change and Zo'or instructs that Da'an must be killed; because he's now considered a threat.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: A Stitch in Time
programme.desc: An exhibition for the first arrival of the Taelons showcases different artifacts. An artifact causes Liam to travel to an alternate time. Zo'or questions how Da'an was able to rejoin the Commonality.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Dimensions
programme.desc: Liam and Augur are in a Taelon shuttle craft, when something happens they get thrown into a parallel universe. They discover that humanity is at war with the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Moonscape
programme.desc: Augur is forced to take part in a Taelon experiment. Da'an and Liam try to convince Zo'or that altering minds and implanting humans to make them aggressive to fight the Jaridians is not the correct path. Maiya makes contact with Sandoval.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Sleepers
programme.desc: A Jaridian probe lands on Earth and begins sucking energy from the Comonality. The Taelons use humans in a near-death state to keep their connection while Lili and Sandoval try to find out what is draining the energy.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Fissures
programme.desc: When large scale blackouts begin to occur in cities with portals, Taelon technology is blamed. Augur and Liam investigate the death of a portal worker by a strange creature that feeds on energy and is particularly attracted to the Taelons.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Sanctuary For All Pt 2
programme.desc: The enigmatic Dr. Helen Magnus recruits an insightful forensic psychiatrist Will Zimmerman (ROBIN DUNNE) to join her in the quest to track, study and protect the strange, and often terrifying creatures that secretly populate our world. Part 2.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Fata Morgana
programme.desc: Dr. Helen Magnus, her daughter Ashley, and new to the Sanctuary, Dr. Will Zimmerman release three women from a mysterious crypt in Scotland, bringing them back to the Sanctuary for refuge.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Folding Man
programme.desc: An investigation into a string of bizarre robberies leads Magnus and Will to a crime ring of thieves who seem to be able to slip between the cracks of the law…literally.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Kush
programme.desc: Returning with an abnormal captured in the Himalayas, Magnus and Will are stranded from civilization and aid after their plane goes down in a desolate mountain range.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Nubbins
programme.desc: When a mating pair of cute, furry and seemingly harmless abnormals is brought in for scientific study, the Sanctuary team begins to exhibit some hidden animal attractions for one another.

programme.title: Sanctuary: The Five
programme.desc: While leading a covert meeting in Rome, Magnus encounters Nikola Tesla, an old friend from her past who confides that the Cabal has come to exact revenge on her for the events in 'Fata Morgana'.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Edward
programme.desc: A young artist with an uncanny ability to draw remarkably detailed pictures from memory may be the key to a solving a case surrounding the suspicious death of his abusive father.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Requiem
programme.desc: Magnus and Will investgate a distressing call for help deep below the Bermuda Triangle resulting in a deadly battle to save Magnus’s life.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Warriors
programme.desc: Investigating the disappearance of an old college friend, Will finds himself caught in an underground fight club where the combatants are genetically engineered abnormals who fight to the death like modern day gladiators.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Strange Partners
programme.desc: A wealthy man uses extortion and a trained attack dog to force Peter to kill his partner and make it look like a heart attack.

programme.title: The Lost World: A Witch's Calling
programme.desc: While Roxton and Malone search for the missing Veronica, two young witches lure them away from safety. Unbeknownst to the explorers, a sorceress and her disciples plot to destroy Challenger.

programme.title: The Lost World: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Malone is pierced by a poison dart from a Keeran blowdart. Under the influence of the hallucinogenic poison, Malone relives his nightmarish experience as a battlefield correspondent in WWI.

programme.title: The Lost World: Ice Age
programme.desc: A new Ice Age threatens the ecosystem. The explorers investigate the site of a meteor crash and try to help a woman. Not knowing who she is, they are targeted by her cold-blooded subjects.

programme.title: Underground Aliens, Baba Vanga and Quantum Biology
programme.desc: Who are the Grey Aliens? Dive into their possible motives in key events: The Roswell Incident, the Hill Abduction, and Travis Walton's encounter.

programme.title: Aliens on the Moon: The Truth Exposed
programme.desc: Aliens On The Moon, a compelling 90-minute documentary special, goes beyond the “official” story to examine what really might have happened on the historic day that mankind first set foot on the Moon in 1969.

programme.title: Alien Agenda: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Alien Agenda Planet Earth reveals the shocking truth about UFOs and Extraterrestrials, a truth that has been suppressed and hidden for centuries.

programme.title: Close Encounters: Proof of Alien Contact
programme.desc: This documentary examines whether UFOs are real. It studies over 250 amateur video clips, evaluates several recent revelations about Roswell, and examines footage of the removal of an alien implant.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Kecksburg UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Kecksburg UFO (Pts. 1 & 2), Update: Pizza Man & 3rd Anniversary Reunion, Unknown Arsonist & UD and Hospital Babynap.

programme.title: The Falcon Lake Incident
programme.desc: Aliens visit Earth often; Canada's 1967 Falcon Lake UFO incident stands out. Canada's frequent sightings make it enigmatic.

programme.title: The UFO Battle of Los Angeles
programme.desc: 1942 LA: A mysterious UFO causes blackout & artillery fire. Remains unexplained.

programme.title: Aliens Among Us: The Michael Wolf Theory
programme.desc: Michael K. Wolf shares 30 years of insights on UFOs, aliens, government projects, and crop circles.

programme.title: Aliens and Pyramids
programme.desc: Many pyramidal structures around the world exhibit strange glyphs of futuristic objects and signs of advanced machining with laser perfection. Was there help from an extraterrestrial source?

programme.title: Alien Abduction: The Mystery Unraveled
programme.desc: This docudrama explores the boundaries of human imagination and fascinating biological phenomena to reveal the scientific roots of a modern-day mythology.

programme.title: Alien Contact: UFO Invaders
programme.desc: Hundreds of UFOs have crashed on Earth. Mankind has witnessed these crashes, communicated with the visitors, even left our planet with them once they are able to return to their worlds, but the most shocking revelation is the reason why they come.

programme.title: Confessions Of An Alien Abductee
programme.desc: Chantelle, Marie and Simon are all alien abductees. These ordinary people share their extraordinary stories as they seek help through the curiously named Anomalous Mind Management Abductee Contactee Helpline, or AMMACH.

programme.title: Alien Cyclops: The Extraordinary Case of Sagrada Familia
programme.desc: In 1963 Brazil, three children witness a UFO in their backyard. An alien cyclops descends, and Mr. Alberto investigates the phenomenon.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jay saves Luke's bacon with a polished portrait. Sketch beautifies Mark's belly Buddha.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 7
programme.desc: Jay, Sketch and Alice face Scott's manscaping stickmen, Chelsea's superfan signature, and Jack's silly souvenir. Meanwhile, fun-loving divorcee Kat, partygoing parents Kay and Richard, and diabetic Sean all go under the needle.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jay banishes Ant's backside buddy, and Alice helps Chelsea get over the shock of her life.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Belieber Nathan decides it's time for Sketch to rid him of his embarassing fan tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 1
programme.desc: Tattoo Fixers on Holidays is back and this week new arrival Glen banishes bad boy Ashley's Magaluf moto, Sketch helps Bobby get rid of his rank rabbit, Alice gives Rachel a sentimental design, and Jay strips Clair of an awful ex tat.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Sketch conceals a large portrait on Les. Alice spreads Becca's favourite food on her leg.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: John's tattoo is on another planet, while Alec has made a big mistake with a tiny inking.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Drag queen Devon feels snared by his barbed-wire tattoo because it's a painful reminder of an ex. Alice welcomes Halloween-loving Chippy, whose portrait of her daughter is more than a little spooky.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 13
programme.desc: Sketch rids Ben of a silly spooning tattoo. Jay fixes Matt's backside-based chat-up line.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Belieber Nathan decides it's time for Sketch to rid him of his embarrassing fan tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10
programme.desc: Jay gives Leuan a tribute to his late sister, while Sketch evicts the eye on Mike's thigh.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 2
programme.desc: Alice tackles Beverley's backside blunder. Jay wipes Bailey's holiday Poomoji tatt clean.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 2
programme.desc: Respectable dad Stephen aims to see the back of a crude tattoo he had 20 years ago. Tattoo-mad ex-solider Rob's phallic self-portrait is a step too far, and Leeanneah has lyrics tattooed on her chest.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 12
programme.desc: Glen devours Harri's fast food foul-up, while Sketch knocks out boxer Russell's tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 14
programme.desc: The artists cover Zoe's tattoo dedicated to her favorite food, Sean's lewd and lengthy leprechaun that his wife wants rid of, and Chantal's pitiful pop portrait that looks like a famous footballer.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Tattoo Fixers are back, and this time they've headed to the scene of the crime to cover awful art...the summer holiday! Ian needs help to cover his Magaluf monstrosity and Jay gives Callum a portrait to remember.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: John's tattoo is on another planet, while Alec has made a big mistake with a tiny inking.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: There is a triple collection of desirable cars in store for Derek when an MG Midget, an Austin-Healey frogeye Sprite and an RS2000 come up for auction.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave's son Jack is heading out to Cheshire to collect two cars with a 35-year age difference. And luckily for Mathewsons, Lucy knows exactly what has been brought in for auction.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A 1970 Excalibur Roadstar, once owned by Roy Orbison, arrives at Thornton le Dale and Derek heads to County Durham to collect a 1935 Austin 7 Ulster that's been completely rebuilt.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Two iconic British classics find their way to the Mathewsons' auction room. Dave heads to North Manchester to pick up an Austin A30 and a Morris 8 E that's had an alternative paint job.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: New. An impressive collection of five iconic cars arrives at Thornton le Dale, including a 1967 Crayford Corsair and a 1966 Ford Zodiac which emerge from a garage in Selby.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Nothing screams 1970s more than a Mk3 Ford Cortina 2000E. Derek Mathewson heads to Brigg to value a 1974 example with classic Coke bottle styling and a sweet Pinto engine.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Nothing screams 1970s more than a Mk3 Ford Cortina 2000E. Derek Mathewson heads to Brigg to value a 1974 example with classic Coke bottle styling and a sweet Pinto engine.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave goes to Wales in order to purchase a Sierra Cosworth, a sought-after car in the bidding market. Dad Derek gets his hands on a more sedate 1926 Standard Tourer - a quirky little motor.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Suffolk to collect two Bentleys with a majestic pedigree, with their own names: Cynthia a stunning 1963 S3 and Harry, a 1965 Continental.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave heads to West Yorkshire to collect a rare 1926 Dodge bus. Derek gets his hands on a rare Vauxhall Victor VX 90 police car that is expected to sell for more than a few coppers.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave heads to Bolton to pick up a classic Italian sports car - a Lancia Fulvia 1.3 Sport. This classic car was styled by the well known Milanese coach builder, Zagato. Zagato are famous for collaborating with high end car brands.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek rubs shoulders with pop music royalty when he picks up a classic Morgan sports car. A World War Two ambulance arrives at Thornton le Dale and a Ford Model T needs a new home.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: This week at the Mathewsons', there is a 1982 Audi Quattro and a Sunbeam Alpine. Plus, Derek takes delivery of a beautiful green Renault van, previously used as a bread van in Paris.

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: The First World War led to a number of astounding war factories, which laid the foundations and paved the way for modern factories of today.

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: The Spitfire, Hurricane, Lancaster and Wellington bombers, aircraft that undoubtedly won the Battle of Britain, had one thing in common, they were powered by the Rolls-Royce Merlin engine.
programme.sub-title: The Engine That Won the War

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: In December 1941, the Japanese attacked Pearl Harbor. The attack was the first ever full-scale assault by carrier-based aircraft in history, bringing America into World War II and changing the way battles were fought.
programme.sub-title: The Rise of the Aircraft Carrier

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: When people think of Skoda, they think of cheap and efficient family cars. As early as the 1930s, their factory was a cover for espionage, sabotage and the liberation of Jews from all over Europe.

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: Ferdinand Porsche was one of the most influential engineers in Nazi Germany. By inventing the most powerful war machines, he created the basis for the muscle cars that made his name famous.

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: The story of how business was put before country during the Second World War in the case of the GM Opel Blitz and the American-owned war factories that produced equipment for the Nazis.

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: The story of the machine gun's development and how it transformed the nature of war. Developed by Hiram Maxim, the world's first fully automatic machine gun weighed 136lbs until British company Vickers adapted the design.
programme.sub-title: The Story of the Machine Gun

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: On the legendary Battle of Britain airfield at Biggin Hill, a dedicated team of young engineers restore to flight a Spitfire that fought over Europe in 1944.

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: A US Army Air Force C47 that dropped paratroopers on D-Day is at the centre of one of the UK's most ambitious warbird rebuilds.

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: A team of engineers fight to return a veteran Westland Wessex helicopter to the skies, 30 years after its last flight.

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: Aircraft restoration expert Mark Masters and his son James rebuild a 1943 US Army Aeronca Defender liaison plane for its German owner.

programme.title: Warbird Workshop
programme.desc: A group of amateur pilots find their light plane has a glorious war record - and launch an ambitious project to rebuild the Piper Cub and restore its military markings.

programme.title: Emma Willis: Delivering Babies
programme.desc: Emma experiences the training process on a maternity ward. In her first week, she is provided with her uniform and ID card before being put straight to work. Emma makes tea, cleans rooms and learns how to do baby checks.

programme.title: Emma Willis: Delivering Babies
programme.desc: Emma meets second-time mum Lianne, who is expecting twins, but complications mean they might be delivered prematurely. Meanwhile, Carly is kept waiting by her second baby.

programme.title: Emma Willis: Delivering Babies
programme.desc: Emma meets Michelle who is 33 weeks pregnant with her second child and has been in and out of hospital for the past month, suffering with heavy bleeding.

programme.title: Emma Willis: Delivering Babies
programme.desc: Emma receives bereavement training, one topic she has not been looking forward to. As she prepares for the training, veteran maternity care assistant, Val, shares a story.

programme.title: Emma Willis: Delivering Babies
programme.desc: Emma is on the labour ward which is a consultant-led maternity unit for higher-risk mums-to-be. 41 year old Nicola and her husband Gavin are her first patients of the day.

programme.title: Emma Willis: Delivering Babies
programme.desc: After 10 weeks, Emma's time as a Maternity Care Assistant comes to an emotional end. During this, Katherine's hopes of a natural birth are dashed as she is rushed into theatre.

programme.title: Emma Willis: Delivering Babies

programme.title: Emma Willis: Delivering Babies
programme.desc: Emma meets Sara and Jake, a newlywed couple in labour with their first baby, along with Beth, who is expecting her first child with her partner Chloe.

programme.title: Emma Willis: Delivering Babies

programme.title: Emma Willis: Delivering Babies

programme.desc: Emma continues her training and assists in an elective caesarian section. She also meets Erinoulla, whose newborn son has a clubfoot.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: It's back! The welcome return of the global event in which daredevil drivers tackle perilous courses in their wacky homemade soapbox vehicles. The action kicks off in Paris.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: Craft, creativity and lots of crashes as the motorless mayhem continues! Crews of enterprising amateur racers steer their screwball soapboxes through the streets of Seattle.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: It's going downhill fast in northern Italy, where 65 nutty teams pit their wacky homemade racers against a 500m-long track. Will any petrol-free motor be a runaway success?

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: Holland isn't known for its steep inclines, but things are going downhill fast in Valkenburg as racers pit their wacky, engineless roadsters against a perilous course!

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: With a total disregard for their welfare, amateur drivers hurtle down Cincinnati's steep streets in their nutty homemade contraptions. Makes for great TV though!

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: The Lewis Hamiltons of the future - alright, maybe that's pushing it - race their gravity-powered motors through the streets of Barcelona. Big crashes guaranteed!

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: Amateur drivers get on their soapboxes in the gravity-powered motor race.

programme.desc: Karen and Natalie continue to face off at Big Ang's party igniting an even bigger rivalry between them. After the mayhem at her bar Ang is fed up with the girls and seeks some much needed advice from an unexpected source.

programme.title: Mob Wives: RATalie

programme.desc: Drita works on promoting her Lady Boss makeup line by organizing a photoshoot for her old school gangster themed calendar.

programme.title: South Park: Die Hippie, Die
programme.desc: Die Hippie, Die: Cartman runs a 'pest control' service to rid the town of hippies and is soon arrested, but when a plague of hippies invades South Park the town turn to him and his methods. (S9, E02)

programme.title: South Park: Wing
programme.desc: Wing: The boys become talent agents to make an easy buck. They take on a Chinese lady named Wing and are soon confronted by the Chinese mafia, looking for a slice of the action. Fight! (S9, E03)

programme.title: South Park: Best Friends Forever
programme.desc: Best Friends Forever: Kenny is in a coma. Cartman wants life-support turned off so he can get his PSP. But Kenny's spirit is leading the armies of heaven against the demons of hell! (S9, E04)

programme.title: South Park: The Losing Edge
programme.desc: The Losing Edge: The boys are bored of playing baseball, and concoct a plan to lose the big play-off game. Randy trains hard to become the biggest drunken jackass at each match. (S9, E05)

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: The Death of Eric Cartman: Everyone decides to ignore Cartman! He is convinced he is dead and must find peace by making amends for his past sins. Will Butters' 'psychic ability' help him? (S9, E06)

programme.title: South Park: Erection Day
programme.desc: Erection Day: Jimmy's noticed that one of his body parts has a mind of his own, so he tries to control his raging hormones in time to perform his comedy routine at the School Talent Show. (S9, E07)

programme.title: South Park: Marjorine
programme.desc: Marjorine: Cartman is convinced that the girls have a device which can see into the future. The boys come up with a plan to take it. Unfortunately for Butters he's a major part of the plan. (S9, E09)

programme.title: South Park: Follow That Egg
programme.desc: Follow That Egg: In a bid to prevent Mr. Slave from marrying Big Gay Al, Mrs. Garrison forces the children to help him in an experiment to prove that gay marriages are unstable. (S9. E10)

programme.title: South Park: Ginger Kids
programme.desc: Ginger Kids: After giving a hate speech against 'the gingers', Cartman awakens the next day with a case of 'Gingervitus' and soon rallies against the persecution of his fellow red heads. (S9, E11)

programme.title: South Park: Free Willzyx
programme.desc: Free Willzyx: The boys are tricked into believing the killer whale at Sea Park is from the moon. How will Timmy's wheelchair, the Russian government and their skateboards help to free him? (S9, E13)

programme.title: South Park: Bloody Mary
programme.desc: Bloody Mary: Randy is arrested for drunk driving and must attend AA, where he is told he is powerless to control himself. Maybe the bleeding Virgin Mary statue can perform a miracle or two? (S9, E14)

programme.title: South Park: The Return of Chef
programme.desc: The Return of Chef: The boys notice that Chef is acting weird after returning from the 'The Super Adventure Club'. Why is he trying to seduce them? Can a trip to a strip joint help? (S10, E01)

programme.title: South Park: Smug Alert!
programme.desc: Smug Alert: Kyle's father buys a new hybrid car but it's not long before his smug levels reach ridiculous levels - must be time to move to San Fran! How will Cartman deal with no Kyle? (S10, E02)

programme.title: South Park: A Million Little Fibers
programme.desc: A Million Little Fibers: Towlie writes his memoirs and it's not long before he's invited onto The Oprah Winfrey Show. (S10, E05)

programme.title: South Park: ManBearPig
programme.desc: ManBearPig: Ex U.S. Vice President Al Gore visits South Park Elementary and warns the pupils about ManBearPig, a monster which is "half man, half bear and half pig" - you can't be "cereal"! (S10, E06)

programme.title: South Park: Tsst!
programme.desc: Tsst: Cartman's mum realizes she can no longer control him, so attempts to get help from various reality TV experts. Only when she recruits the "Dog Whisperer" do results start to happen. (S10, E07)

programme.title: South Park: Make Love, Not Warcraft
programme.desc: Make Love, Not Warcraft: The boys are all shades of mad when a 'griefer' repeatedly kills them in an online game. Some serious training is in order so they can defeat him and play the game! (S10, E08)

programme.title: South Park: Rainforest Shmainforest
programme.desc: Rainforest Schmainforest: The boys go to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the "Getting Gay With Kids" choir tour, but Cartman is on a mission to cause havoc. Jennifer Aniston guests. (S3, E01)

programme.title: South Park: Mystery of the Urinal Deuce
programme.desc: Mystery of The Urinal Deuce: Someone defecates in a urinal at school! Cartman rants that it's a conspiracy "like 9/11!" The entire town think so too! Time for a trip to the White House. (S10, E09)

programme.title: South Park starts at 9pm
programme.desc: Relive the dawn of the South Park era, with legendary episodes of the groundbreaking, Emmy® Award-winning animated classic. Follow everyone's favorite troublemakers—Stan, Kyle, Cartman, and Kenny--from the very beginning of their unforgettable adventures.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Former champions Panic Attack and Aggrobot II are ready to battle for a place in the semi-finals.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The return of Hypno Disc and Cerberus, ready to do battle with four others for the last semi-final berth.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The first semi-final which sees the return of Chaos 2 and Firestorm as they prepare to do battle with six other heat winners.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Panic Attack and Hypno Disc take to the arena in this second semi-final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The Grand Final will see the crowning of the fourth Robot Wars champion.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The first heat of the Fifth Wars raises the bar for action. With newcomers outnumbering the veterans, finding out if an underdog will manage to secure a place in the finals.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One newcomer gets a forceful yet thorough tour of the arena hazards in the eliminators. Flippers prove to be this heats weapon of choice and they are put to great effect, as many robots take to the air.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The eliminators continue as more newcomers and veterans enter the arena, ready to destroy each other for the spot in the finals. One competitor's design renders their adversary's weapon useless.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Witnessing one of the quickest immobilisations in Robot Wars history. A house robot gets a little too eager when trying to pit a competitor.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: More hopefuls enter the arena, as they risk life and limb for a chance at the finals. An equally matched battle leaves the decisions to the judges, and two house robots work together to inflict some last minute damage.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Halfway through the heats and the competition is on fire, literally. The arena is out for revenge after another competitor inadvertently vandalises it. One robot commits the ultimate sin, attacking the benevolent Refbot.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The house robots venture into the funeral business as they hold cremations and burials in the Robot Wars arena, to the applause of a live audience. One flip may spell doom early on for one competitor.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: An extensive and informative dive behind-the-scenes on the House Robots. Get inside information from designer Chris Reynolds, on what goes into creating these killing machines.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Follow Team Chaos's journey, from humble beginnings to how they ended up building one of the most feared Robots ever to compete.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Featuring behind-the-scenes footage of Heat F of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including video diaries of the Ron and Panic Attack teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The undercover secrets and un-muzzled action of `Robot Wars', see how competitors prepare their robots for victory, or defeat.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Featuring behind-the-scenes footage of Heat H of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including video diaries of the Sting, Loco and Wizard teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes footage of Heat I of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', including video diaries of the King Buxton and All Torque teams preparing their robots for the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Another visit behind the scenes of `Robot Wars' series 2, more exclusive footage as access to the pits shows every nook and cranny of the week's competitors.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The first heat of the Fifth Wars raises the bar for action. With newcomers outnumbering the veterans, finding out if an underdog will manage to secure a place in the finals.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Wyatt & Whitney
programme.desc: Crashing at the in-laws,living with zero privacy, Wyatt and Whitney are desperate to buy their own home.The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help the couple find a budget-friendly dream home that can be renovated

programme.title: Property Brothers: Morgan & Kristin
programme.desc: Kristin and Morgan are too cramped in their duplex rental and are desperate to buy their first home. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help the couple find a budget-friendly dream home that can be renovated.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Dan & Brittany
programme.desc: Dan and Brittany love to live large but their small space has left them eager to buy their first home. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help the couple find a budget-friendly dream home that can be renovated.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Stan & Leslie
programme.desc: Jammed into a tiny condo with their two teenage daughters, Stan and Leslie need to buy a new house pronto.The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help the family find a budget-friendly dream home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Kate & Cole
programme.desc: Forced to live and work out of a cramped rental with their beloved dogs and cat, Kate and Cole decide it's finally time to buy their first house.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Steph & Micah
programme.desc: Happily married for three years, Steph and Micah are ready to buy their first house but can't find anything that meets their needs.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Lana & Jacob
programme.desc: Tripping over themselves in their tiny one bedroom apartment, Lana and Jacob are ready to buy their first house.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Amber
programme.desc: Fresh out of a six-year relationship, Amber is determined to move on and buy a new house. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help her find a budget-friendly dream home that can be renovated on time.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Jessica & Rob
programme.desc: Forced to live with their in-laws, Jessica, Rob, and their fiercely independent 5-year old daughter, Coco, are desperate to buy a new house. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help them find a home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Olivia
programme.desc: Wildly social and tired of being crammed in a tiny apartment, Olivia is desperate to buy a new house.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Sophie & Preston
programme.desc: Tired of renting and in need of more space for their fabulous parties, Sophie, Preston, and their five-year-old son Finn, are desperate to buy a new house. The Property Brothers come to the rescue.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Cori & Suroosh
programme.desc: With two young boys and a huge extended family that loves to socialize, Cori and Suroosh are desperate to buy a new house. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help them find a budget-friendly dream home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Jeanette & Tony
programme.desc: In between places and forced to crash with friends, Jeanette and Tony are desperate to buy a new house. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help them find a budget-friendly dream home that can be renovated.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Kristi & Jay
programme.desc: Paralyzed by indecision and tired of renting, Kristi and Jay are desperate to buy a new house. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help them find a budget-friendly dream home that can be renovated on time.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Luke & Courtney
programme.desc: Cramped in a tiny condo with newborn twins and a two-year-old daughter, Luke and Courtney are desperate to buy a new house. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help them find a budget-friendly dream home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: April
programme.desc: Working long hours and eager to upgrade her starter home, April is looking to buy a house in the downtown core. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help her find a budget-friendly dream home to be renovated.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Kristine & Paul
programme.desc: Stuck in a tiny apartment with their rambunctious young son, Evan, Kristine and Paul are desperate to buy a spacious home. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help the couple find a budget-friendly dream home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Sarah & Mari
programme.desc: Crammed in close quarters with her sister's family, Sarah and partner Mari desperately need their own house to raise their baby daughter. The Property Brothers come to the rescue and help them find a budget-friendly home

programme.title: Property Brothers: Samira & Shawn
programme.desc: Busy professionals Samira and Shawn are living out of a suitcase as they hunt for the perfect house-ideally a luxury pad close to Shawn's office. The Property Brothers help them find a budget-friendly dream home.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Wheatsheaf Horror
programme.desc: New owners of the Wheatsheaf Pub find bits of clothing and bones behind the walls.

programme.title: A Haunting: Darkness Follows
programme.desc: A girl commits suicide and her spirit haunts the new tenants.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon's Lair
programme.desc: For years, the Cranmer family thought their historic Pittsburgh dream home was haunted by a harmless ghost. But, when the activity grows violent, they fight back with the only weapon they have, prayer; culminating with an exorcism of the house.

programme.title: A Haunting: Spellbound
programme.desc: Sandra learns her house is haunted. She tries to perform Wiccan ceremonies but opens a portal.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demons Never Die
programme.desc: Shortly after starting a new job and moving his family to the suburbs, Bill Toler suspects his house is haunted. Paranormal investigators uncover a portal in their home and discover a demon followed Bill home from his job at the state penitentiary.

programme.title: A Haunting: Curse Of The Mummy
programme.desc: On a visit to an exhibit of ancient Egyptian artifacts, Caleb Weaver experiences a chilling encounter with an unwrapped mummy and unleashes the wrath of a vile beast. Now stronger and more furious than ever, it seeks to possess Caleb.

programme.title: A Haunting: A Haunting in Ireland
programme.desc: The Fahey family’s new addition stirs up psychic energy of a crime committed years ago.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Calling
programme.desc: Rebecca hears spirits but is able to ignore them until one emerges who refuses to be ignored.

programme.title: A Haunting: Casa de los Muertos
programme.desc: Eddie Benitez fears the spirit of a dead man who committed suicide is slowly killing his son.

programme.title: A Haunting: Curse Of The Mummy
programme.desc: On a visit to an exhibit of ancient Egyptian artifacts, Caleb Weaver experiences a chilling encounter with an unwrapped mummy and unleashes the wrath of a vile beast. Now stronger and more furious than ever, it seeks to possess Caleb.

programme.title: A Haunting: A Haunting in Ireland
programme.desc: The Fahey family’s new addition stirs up psychic energy of a crime committed years ago.

programme.title: A Haunting: Fear Feeders
programme.desc: Soon after Al Gonzalez purchases a home outside Fort Wayne, Indiana, he begins to hear strange noises and sees unexplainable shadows. Paranormal investigators determine the entities in Al's home are dangerous and that he is not their first victim.

programme.title: A Haunting: Heartland Horror
programme.desc: Teenager Nolan Lydolph has seen ghosts his entire life. But after he and his parents return home from a ghost tour in Missouri, strange spirits creep through their home. Nolan undertakes a life-threatening struggle to rid his family of an undaunted evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hidden Terror
programme.desc: After Mike and Lisa move in their new house, Lisa’s personality begins to change dramatically.

programme.title: A Haunting: Phantom Room
programme.desc: Shari and Erol find the perfect California home to raise Shari’s two young daughters. When they discover a mysterious secret room hidden inside their garage, it triggers a ghostly presence. Now, Shari knows she must do something to protect her daughters.

programme.title: A Haunting: Monster in the Apartment
programme.desc: A ghost attacks Morgan Knudsen in order to drive her out and get to her friend Bob.

programme.title: A Haunting: Angels And Demons
programme.desc: Maryland single Mom Kathie Sheats hopes life will change for the better when she marries her boyfriend Brian. But "something" inside her house has other ideas. Spiritual warfare literally breaks out...taking over Kathie's mind, body and soul.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Confessions
programme.desc: An unknown entity appears to find pleasure in terrifying 17-year-old Macy Sherman, her younger sister Kelsey and their mom Carrie. The family reaches out for help, praying that they can get rid of the spirit intent on staying in their home forever.

programme.title: Eggheads
programme.desc: The Eggheads team are made up of some of Britain's top quizzers. They face a team of challengers trying to beat the incumbents in order to win a cash prize. If the Eggheads beat the challengers, the cash prize is rolled over to subsequent episodes.

programme.title: Frontline Police
programme.desc: Rav sets off on a patrol of Southend.

programme.title: Educating Cardiff
programme.desc: We meet Head Teacher Joy Ballad, her team of staff and some dynamic students. Under Joy's leadership the Willows High School in Cardiff has made a huge turnaround since it was one of the worst performing schools in Cardiff.

programme.title: Educating Cardiff
programme.desc: Two Year 7 boys make the transition from being the biggest fish at primary school to being the smallest at secondary. Teachers are worried that nervous Aaron is finding it hard to make friends, while Assad's naughty antics are disrupting the school.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A crazed cab driver goes on a seven-hour shooting spree, killing six people and critically injuring two.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A mother-of-two mysteriously disappears after spending the night at a local New Mexico bar. The police race against the clock to hopefully find her alive, and are shocked by what they uncover.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Detectives have a brutal case on their hands when a beloved community member is killed and a part of his body is apparently taken as a souvenir by the murderer.

programme.title: The Real Story of...
programme.desc: The 2010 film "The Social Network" is scriptwriter Aaron Sorkin's story about Facebook.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A look at the life and terrible crimes of Gary Ridgway. One of the US's most prolific serial killers, he had cops baffled for 20 years and killed so many women he lost count of his victims.
programme.sub-title: Gary Ridgway: The Green River Killer

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Disturbing killer Edmund Kemper began by murdering his grandparents, before going on to kill and dismember six college girls, his mother and her friend.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A look at the murders of Richard Ramirez, who slept in cemeteries as a child and later spread terror in LA by killing, and often raping, over 14 victims.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Known as `the meanest man in America', Donald Henry Gaskins brutally tortured and killed over 100 people. And, even on Death Row, he managed to commit one final murder.

programme.title: Educating Cardiff
programme.desc: We meet Head Teacher Joy Ballad, her team of staff and some dynamic students. Under Joy's leadership the Willows High School in Cardiff has made a huge turnaround since it was one of the worst performing schools in Cardiff.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A crazed cab driver goes on a seven-hour shooting spree, killing six people and critically injuring two.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A mother-of-two mysteriously disappears after spending the night at a local New Mexico bar. The police race against the clock to hopefully find her alive, and are shocked by what they uncover.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Detectives have a brutal case on their hands when a beloved community member is killed and a part of his body is apparently taken as a souvenir by the murderer.

programme.title: The Real Story of...
programme.desc: The 2010 film "The Social Network" is scriptwriter Aaron Sorkin's story about Facebook.

programme.title: Superhospital
programme.desc: Episode one features Dan, an energetic consultant, who is under pressure to find out what is wrong with a 20-year-old who is having violent fits. He then resuscitates Eric, a 65-year-old who has a sudden cardiac arrest.

programme.title: Superhospital
programme.desc: Episode two features hospital maintenance boys Martin and John, who double up as the fire and rescue team. Susie is one of the most experienced consultants in Accident and Emergency and works with both adults and children.

programme.title: Educating Cardiff
programme.desc: The focus is on two feisty girls from Year 10, who aren't afraid of voicing their opinions and express exactly how they are feeling at all times. The staff at Willows have to use every tactic available to ensure that the girls stay on track.

programme.title: Miss London Ltd.
programme.desc: Arthur Askey stars as a man trying to save his flagging escort agency. A new partner suggests getting some new girls in, just in time for the soldiers' leave.

programme.title: Love, Life and Laughter
programme.desc: A young man of royalty falls in love with the daughter of a pub owner, but is compelled by duty to return to the throne.

programme.title: The Naked Truth
programme.desc: Four high profile personalities band together to bump off a tabloid magazine publisher who threatens to expose their dark secrets.

programme.title: One Good Turn
programme.desc: A promise that an orphan will receive a model car leads to zany adventures.

programme.title: Nine Men
programme.desc: A group of World War II British soldiers are attacked from the air while travelling across the desolate wasteland of Libya.

programme.title: Old Bill and Son
programme.desc: Old Bill, an old First World War soldier, argues with his son Young Bill about the latter not holding down a job. Soon afterwards the Second World War breaks out and Young Bill and his father find themselves serving side by side.

programme.title: Neutral Port
programme.desc: When a port refuses to let a captain seize a Nazi supply ship after his is torpedoed, he takes matters into his own hands.

programme.title: On the Night of the Fire
programme.desc: A barber gives in to temptation and commits a theft, stealing some money from another shopkeeper, which leads to his involvement in blackmail and murder.

programme.title: One Jump Ahead
programme.desc: Intrepid British reporters attempt to stay ahead of the authorities as they track a killer and a child witness.

programme.title: One Way Out
programme.desc: A policeman risks his career when he accepts a bribe to keep his daughter from being implicated in a robbery.

programme.title: Personal Affair
programme.desc: In a 1950s British village woman disappears after a frank talk with the wife of a Latin teacher she loves, prompting the police to investigate the teacher amidst public rumours of assault and murder.

programme.title: Personal Affair
programme.desc: In a 1950s British village woman disappears after a frank talk with the wife of a Latin teacher she loves, prompting the police to investigate the teacher amidst public rumours of assault and murder.

programme.title: Portrait From Life
programme.desc: An Army Major attempts to find a Jewish girl after seeing her portrait in a London art gallery.

programme.title: Medium: A Cure For What Ails You
programme.desc: Allison has visions of a friend of Scanlon and Lynn DiNovi dying in a home mishap.
programme.sub-title: A Cure For What Ails You

programme.title: Medium: Car Trouble
programme.desc: Allison meets Meghan Doyle, Joe's new business partner. Meanwhile, her old car stops working and Joe surprises her with a nice looking used car.

programme.title: Medium: Being Joey Carmichael
programme.desc: Allison has dreams that help Scanlon in his search to find out who killed a wealthy local drug dealer.

programme.title: Medium: Drowned World
programme.desc: In the fourth season finale, Allison tries to help a young couple who thinks their house is haunted, but her efforts result in murder.

programme.title: Medium: Soul Survivor
programme.desc: Devalos' friend's sister is murdered and Allison tries to help solve the crime. Her dreams don't seem to make sense though, as they keep implicating the friend's first husband, who died two years ago, as the murderer.

programme.title: Medium: Things To Do In Phoenix When You're Dead
programme.desc: Allison dreams of a ghost who was a witness to several murders. Meanwhile, Ariel has a strange reaction to an assignment in health class.
programme.sub-title: Things To Do In Phoenix When You're Dead

programme.title: Medium: A Person Of Interest
programme.desc: While working on a 17 year-old-crime, Allison exhibits unusual behavior that may be pivotal in solving the case, but at the same time puts her family at risk.

programme.title: Medium: ...About Last Night
programme.desc: Allison wakes up under a freeway overpass, not knowing where she is or how she got there. Her lack of recent memory causes her to start thinking she may have killed someone with her car.

programme.title: Medium: A Taste Of Her Own Medicine
programme.desc: Allison is asked by Devalos to help some of his friends find their missing daughter, but encounters conflicting evidence of who is responsible for her disappearance.
programme.sub-title: A Taste Of Her Own Medicine

programme.title: Medium: Apocalypse...Now?
programme.desc: Several disturbing dreams of an impending apocalypse cause Allison to take drastic measures in preparation for the end of civilization.

programme.title: Medium: A Necessary Evil
programme.desc: Allison is visited once again by the ghost of Agent Cooper, who tries to help her figure out who the real murderer is in a confusing case.

programme.title: Medium: Truth Be Told
programme.desc: Allison has a dream about a game show that can detect lies, and upon waking up she hears a buzzer in her head whenever someone tells her a lie.

programme.title: Medium: All In The Family
programme.desc: Allison suspects that a missing woman may be a victim of her strange children. Meanwhile, Joe's sister Sarah shows up unannounced.

programme.title: Medium: Then...And Again
programme.desc: Allison wakes up five years in the past after she and Devalos are gunned down by a strange man. In the past, Allison's dreams tell her that Devalos is going to convict an innocent man of murder.

programme.title: Medium: The Devil Inside, Part One
programme.desc: A man named Lucas Harvey is stalking Allison, convinced that he's doing the work of God by getting rid of her and her ability.

programme.title: Medium: The Devil Inside, Part Two
programme.desc: Allison continues to be tormented by Lucas Harvey, her obsessed stalker. Harvey corrupts Allison's dreams, making her unhelpful to Devalos and Scanlon during a serial murderer case.

programme.title: Medium: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 1
programme.desc: Allison leaves her job at the D.A.'s office after she's recruited to work for the Lydecker Corporation by another psychic who works there. While enjoying her new job, Allison still regrets leaving the D.A.'s office so suddenly.
programme.sub-title: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 1

programme.title: Medium: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 2
programme.desc: While at her new job at the Lydecker Corporation, Allison shares the dreams she's been having of the serial killer in Phoenix with Devalos and Scanlon.
programme.sub-title: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 2

programme.title: Medium: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 3
programme.desc: Allison struggles with her decision to switch jobs. When she continues to have visions about a serial killer she is forced to choose between honoring the contract with her new job and sharing her information with the police.
programme.sub-title: How To Make A Killing In Big Business, Part 3

programme.title: Medium: The Man In The Mirror
programme.desc: After falling into a coma during an investigation, Allison's spirit finds it's way into the body of a man named Todd Emory. Joe and the kids have to adjust to living with Allison's spirit in the body of Todd, who insists on living with them.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210: Shooting Star / American in Paris
programme.desc: Brenda pretends to be French to spend time with an American student in Paris.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210: Castles in the Sand
programme.desc: Brenda and Donna return from Paris, and Brenda suspects that Dylan may have been romantically involved with Kelly during the summer.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210: A Song of Myself
programme.desc: It's back to school and trouble arises when Brenda, Steve, and Donna sign up to be "senior buddies".

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210: The Back Story
programme.desc: Brenda tests the bounds of her friendships after being interviewed for a sleazy tabloid TV show.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210: Highwire
programme.desc: David accidentally walks in on Kelly while she's dressing after a shower. Brandon and Brenda grapple with future financial burdens while selecting colleges.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210: Home and Away
programme.desc: A shooting at a rival high school raises concerns at West Beverly High.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210: A Presumption of Innocence
programme.desc: Sue Scanlon accuses Gil Meyers of sexual misconduct, which leads to his suspension. Andrea offers her support to the misguided teen and finds that there's more to the story than Sue is telling.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210: Destiny Rides Again
programme.desc: Dylan and Brenda's relationship become strained, while David encourages Donna to have sex with him.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210: Rebel With A Cause
programme.desc: After his breakup with Brenda, Dylan begins seeing Kelly again. Cindy Walsh feels jealousy over Jim's attractive new secretary.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210: Wild Horses
programme.desc: Steve's computer break-in results in his suspension from West Beverly, while Dylan meets a beautiful and wealthy woman.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210: The Kindness of Strangers
programme.desc: The Walshes share Thanksgiving with the homeless man that Brandon had met during the summer.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210: The Game Is Chicken
programme.desc: Steve and Brandon become involved in dangerous drag strip racing. Brenda and Kelly go on a blind double date to make Dylan jealous.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210: It's a Totally Happening Life
programme.desc: The Gang celebrates the Christmas season by giving gifts to a group of underprivileged children.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210: Midlife...Now What?
programme.desc: Secrets are revealed during a girls-only spa retreat, and Brandon begins gambling with a bookie.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210: Back in the High Life Again
programme.desc: Dylan's father is released on parole and David feels the fallout from a parent's infidelity.
programme.sub-title: Back in the High Life Again

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210: Parental Guidance Recommended
programme.desc: Suspicions arise over Jack's handling of Dylan's trust fund. David is offered a deal by a music label but is pressured to fire Steve as his manager.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210: Dead End
programme.desc: Jack and Dylan begin a new life together, living aboard a yacht with Dylan's enormous trust fund at their disposal. On the surface, everything seems perfect, but Jack has some dangerous enemies.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210: The Child is the Father to the Man
programme.desc: After Dylan accepts an invitation to stay at the Walsh home, he finds that old demons have returned to haunt him
programme.sub-title: The Child is the Father to the Man

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210: Duke's Bad Boy
programme.desc: Brandon's gambling spins out of control. Donna feels that David's new record label is running his music.

programme.desc: Lee recovers a lorry with a ruptured fuel tank.

programme.desc: A gravel truck has ended up in a ditch.

programme.desc: Merrie pitches up at a golf course to rescue a tanker.

programme.desc: A tipper truck full of gravel rolls into a farmer's field.

programme.desc: Buzz and Tez race to rescue a lorry with medical supplies.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: Tez has a stinker of a job.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: Stig fears for his safety when he has to rescue a lorry.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 20
programme.desc: Buzz is sent to rescue a double decker artic.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: Steve rescues a burning transporter loaded with cars.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: A trailer rolls over on a busy roundabout.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 4
programme.desc: A 44-tonne truck rolls over and blocks a dual carriageway.

programme.desc: Ant and Matt face up to a lorry crash on a narrow road.

programme.desc: A 44-tonne truck careers off the A1.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: A 26-tonne bin lorry has fallen onto its side.

programme.desc: A dustcart leans dangerously by a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: A horsebox breaks down on the busy M25.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: Crouch recovery op Buzz is forced to abandon his wrecker.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: Martin leads an all-night rescue.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
