programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Zhao's invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe's defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful `Avatar State' as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation. But it's more difficult than Aang thinks.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: On the way to Omashu, the kids meet some nomads who show them a shortcut through the `cave of two lovers'. When they get lost in the caves, they must trust in love to escape.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The kids return to Omashu so that Aang can learn Earthbending from King Bumi; however, when they get there, they are shocked to find the city is now in Fire Nation hands.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being `connected to the Earth' from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang and the gang discover an Earth town that celebrates `Avatar Day'. They learn that it is not a celebration of the Avatar, but a festival of anger for something Aang did in his past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: In search for an Earthbending teacher for Aang, the kids go to an underground Earthbending tournament where they encounter Toph, a blind, but powerful Earthbender.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Travelling without Uncle now, Zuko wanders alone into an Earth Kingdom town where he bonds with a local boy. Meanwhile, Zuko is haunted by memories of his own youth.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher. Meanwhile, Sokka gets himself in a jam.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: A professor leads the kids to a spirit library in the middle of the desert, where Sokka hopes to discover powerful secrets to use against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: Aang searches for Appa, while Katara struggles to keep everyone together so they can survive in the vast desert. Meanwhile, Uncle and Zuko seek help from an ancient secret society.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the kids can't take the easy way into Ba Sing Se, they must escort a family of refugees there the hard way, through the deadly Serpent's Pass.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: Aang discovers a colossal Fire Nation invention heading for Ba Sing Se, and the kids must stop it before it destroys the great wall that protects the city.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang and the kids finally arrive in Ba Sing Se to see the Earth King, only to find mysterious forces within the city conspiring to stop them.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: A series of short stories that explore the individual adventures of Katara and Toph, Uncle, Sokka, Aang, Zuko, and Momo.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: In this special episode, we go back in time to the moment Appa was stolen.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: While searching for Appa, the kids run into Jet but are torn about whether to trust him or not. Meanwhile, Zuko also hunts for Appa.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids battle Long Feng when they try to show the Earth King the conspiracy taking place in his city. Zuko becomes seriously ill and has odd dreams as he faces a spiritual crisis.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: A guru at the Eastern Air Temple helps Aang take the next step in his Avatar journey. Plus, Sokka meets his long-lost father, Azula hatches a diabolical plan, and Uncle and Zuko open a tea shop.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Everyone races against time to stop Azula's sinister conquest of Ba Sing Se. Zuko and Katara spend time together, while Aang's destiny hangs in the balance, as does Zuko's.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: After sustaining serious injuries, Aang awakens to find himself aboard a Fire Nation ship. Meanwhile, Zuko journeys home.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: To better camouflage themselves as real Fire Nation citizens, the kids check out a Fire Nation school. Also, Zuko confronts Uncle.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The gang arrive at a suffering Fire Nation fishing village, and a mysterious spirit appears to help the villagers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: Sokka feels that he is not contributing enough to the group, and searches for a mysterious master to teach him the ways of the sword.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Zuko, Azula, Mai, and Ty Lee go on vacation at Lo and Li's beach house, where they learn a lot about themselves and each other. Meanwhile, the kids face a new enemy.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: Aang and Zuko are taken on parallel adventures that give them insight into their forefathers' pasts, but how does the tale of Roku and Sozin matter to them now?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: When Toph discovers a quick way to make cash, Katara disapproves, and the rift between them has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: In a spooky village, Katara makes a special connection; the group investigate strange disappearances that occur during full moons.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: On the eve of the eclipse, Aang's worry overtakes him and his dreams become nightmares. Before long, he can't tell the difference between what's real and what's not.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: With the day of the eclipse upon them, the kids, along with a ragtag force of old friends, enact their long-planned invasion of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: As the invasion force fights their way to the Fire Nation capital, the kids help Aang find the Firelord in time for the eclipse, but after a few surprises.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the group seek refuge at the Western Air temple, they find someone they weren't expecting has been following them and hopes to join their group.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: As Zuko teaches Aang firebending, it turns out Aang isn't the only one who needs a lesson. The two set-out to learn the true meaning of Firebending from the original teachers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko head to the Fire Nation's most heavily guarded prison - the Boiling Rock - in hopes to find and break-out the captured invasion force.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko have to rethink their escape plan after things go wrong. They end up getting help from a few unexpected sources.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Katara sets out to confront the Fire Nation soldier who killed her mother. However, no one knows what she will do when she finds him.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Night of the Rogues
programme.desc: Determined to stop the turtles once and for all, Shredder enlists some of the most memorable villains from past episodes into an army of 'rogues'!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the Neutrinos
programme.desc: When Krang captures the Neutrino's, he subjects the fun-loving, hot-rodding teenagers from Dimension X to a brain treatment which turns them evil!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Escape from the Planet of the Turtleoids
programme.desc: The Turtles must once again help their Turtleoid friend Kurma defend the planet Shellri-La from alien invaders.
programme.sub-title: Escape from the Planet of the Turtleoids

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Revenge of the Fly
programme.desc: When Baxter Stockman, AKA the Fly, gets his pincers on some of Krang and Shredder's mutagen, he uses it to start turning everyone in the city into giant hideous mutant insects!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Atlantis Awakes
programme.desc: The Turtles join forces with Merdude, a strange fish-creature, and journey with him to the fabulous underwater city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Dirk Savage: Mutant Hunter
programme.desc: When eccentric zillionaire A.J. Howard hires Dirk Savage, a professional mercenary, to rid the city of its 'mutant problem', the first mutants he goes after are the Turtles!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Krangazoids
programme.desc: It's trouble for the Turtles when Krang makes five clones of himself and sends them up to do his bidding in the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Combat Land
programme.desc: The Turtles are invited to be the first guests at combat Land, an amusement park where visitors fight a wide variety of robotic warriors from various historical eras.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder Triumphant!
programme.desc: The Turtles face their greatest challenge ever when they become trapped in Dimension X--while Shredder and Krang bring the Technodrome out of the ocean depths and at last conquer the city!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Get Shredder!
programme.desc: Shredder & Krang are still loose on Earth, but without the resources of the Technodrome, they plan to steal equipment from the abandoned Hall of Science at the World Fair.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Wrath of the Rat King
programme.desc: Burne has created a hot line for callers to use should they spot those responsible for the destruction of the Channel Six News Building. Inside the Hall of Science, Shredder is fearful that the Turtles will eventually find a way into the building.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cyber-Turtles
programme.desc: While investigating the theft of a rare telescope, the Astro-Viewer, the Turtles discover odd tracks leading away from the National Space Exploration Centre.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): State of Shock
programme.desc: After defeating a mysterious group of ninjas at the Emeryville Power Station, the Turtles decode part of a map that they were able to liberate from the would-be thieves.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cry H.A.V.O.C.!
programme.desc: The Turtles get the drop on masked thieves hijacking a jewellery store, only to have themselves arrested for the crime! Before the turtles can be booked, they are rescued by the mutants Amok and Overdrive.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): H.A.V.O.C. in the Streets!
programme.desc: Titanus sends of couple of his H.A.V.O.C.mutants to bust into the aerospace plant and steal some much needed equipment. Only problem is that the Turtles were waiting for them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: Krakus
programme.desc: Krakus, a cop from the future, arrives and thinking that the Turtles are in league with Titanus, shakes them down for information.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtle Trek
programme.desc: Krang activates his new dimensional portal, thanks to Shredder's installation of the Energy Transmitter at the Power Relay Station, giving him access to Dimension X.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Unknown Ninja
programme.desc: While watching video tapes of old battles, Raphael sees a mystery person spying on them. While the Turtles investigate, an alien warlord named Dregg sends his TechnoGansters to steal all the gold on Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Dregg of the Earth
programme.desc: April contacts the Turtles to let them know that Dregg has landed on Earth and is preparing a press conference. The Turtles rush to meet April at the Park, where they hear Dregg announce his intentions and offers the world his molecular converter.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Wrath of Medusa
programme.desc: Believing that the Turtles are the only thing that stands between him and total domination of the planet, Dregg makes contact with Medusa, a sinisterly beautiful alien.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Showdown
programme.desc: April contacts the Turtles to inform them that all the TV stations in the City are jammed. Sleazebug tries to recruit the Turtles for a martial arts tournament.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Split-Second
programme.desc: Carter, April and the Turtles investigate a break-in at the Antique Timepiece Museum. Convinced that Dregg is responsible, the Turtles discover a clue on a wall display.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Carter the Enforcer
programme.desc: Splinter convinces the Turtles that it is their duty to fight evil, even when the whole world is against them. Carter and the Turtles team up with April to get the goods on Dregg.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Return of Dregg
programme.desc: While the Turtles work on using fragments of the Vortex Crystal to stabilize their mutations, Lord Dregg plans to use the fragments to create another Vortex Crystal to power his Vortex Transporter.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Beginning of the End
programme.desc: While Raphael, Michelangelo, Donatello and Carter work on restoring Leonardo to his regular self, Mung steals all the plutonium from a power plant in order for Dregg to build a Plutonium Ray to turn Leonardo into a radioactive killer.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Power of Three
programme.desc: Mungg informs Dregg that he came across two individuals who claimed they were old acquaintances of the turtles: Shredder and Krang!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Turtle in Time
programme.desc: The Turtles', Shredder's and Krang's battles skills, powers, and memories are absorbed into Dregg.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles to the Second Power
programme.desc: Dregg and his crew plan an invasion of Earth to make it his new home base, but first he has to get his transporter chip back from Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Day the Earth Disappeared
programme.desc: With the city breaking apart, the Turtles head to the street to investigate and see the Dreggnaut appear in the sky. With Mung's help, Dregg reprograms the transporter to open a warp in space.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Lord Dregg launches a final attack on the Ninja Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtle Tracks
programme.desc: April O'Neil, ace reporter for Channel 6, investigates recent break-ins, allegedly by Ninjas, which have resulted in the thefts of numerous technologies.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Shredder
programme.desc: The Shredder kidnaps Splinter in an attempt to lure the Turtles to his own cause. In order to rescue Splinter the Turtles must enter the Shredder's mobile fortress and brave its dangerous weaponry.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Thing about Rats
programme.desc: Baxter Stockman, a mad scientist, is showing an exterminator his new invention: a rat catching robot called Mousers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Hot Rodding Teenagers from Dimension X
programme.desc: Shredder experiments with the Inter-Dimensional Portal, hoping to contact Krang's' Rock Soldiers and prepare an invasion of Earth.
programme.sub-title: Hot Rodding Teenagers from Dimension X

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder & Splintered
programme.desc: Shredder lures Splinter into the Technodrome, this time with the promise that a weapon in his possession can restore the sensei to human form.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Shredder
programme.desc: Shredder trains students at the Dojo for a crooked Turtles gang. The mock turtles' crime spree starts turning the public against Michelangelo, Raphael, Donatello and Leonardo.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Incredible Shrinking Turtles
programme.desc: In the first of a four-parter, the amazing amphibians search for the segments of the powerful crystal Eye of Sarnoth. Shredder cuts the Turtles down to size, literally.

programme.title: Riptide: Who Really Watches The Sunset?
programme.desc: A reporter who only has six months to live, hires the Riptide Agency to find out who killed her.

programme.title: Riptide: Still Goin' Steady
programme.desc: Murray has been appearing on a game show, 'Brain Basher'.

programme.title: Riptide: Robin And Marian
programme.desc: When a guy who pretends to be Robin Hood robs almost everyone in king harbor, he accidently takes engraving plates for a counterfeiting scheme.

programme.title: Riptide: Requiem For Icarus
programme.desc: Nick reacquaints with an old buddy who he hasn't seen or heard from in five years.

programme.title: Riptide: Home For Christmas
programme.desc: Nick spends his Christmas arranging the funeral of a dead soldier. But when the wrong body is shipped, he and the team quickly uncover the dark circumstances behind his death.

programme.title: Riptide: Lady Killer
programme.desc: Someone in King Harbor is killing young blonde women, and the Riptide Agency's latest client has an idea who it may be.

programme.title: Riptide: A Matter Of Policy
programme.desc: Things are looking up for Nick when he's named as a beneficiary for a large estate. But soon the team realizes that the money may come at a cost.

programme.title: Riptide: The Wedding Bell Blues
programme.desc: When a millionaire hires the team to find his future wife, they find more than they bargained for, and land in the midst of a mob war.

programme.title: Riptide: The Frankie Kahana Show
programme.desc: While at a lounge listening to a singer from Hawaii, a couple things break up the show, trying to kill the host. Soon, the team is embroiled in a case.

programme.title: Riptide: Smiles We Left Behind
programme.desc: When they go to pick up their dry cleaning, the guys can tell something is upsetting Lucy.

programme.title: Riptide: The Pirate And The Princess
programme.desc: The Riptide crew reunites with Angelo en Giovanna Guirilini as they try to find the lost treasure of captain William Tyson.

programme.title: Riptide: Playing Hardball
programme.desc: A professional baseball team has a drug problem, so Nick and Cody go undercover as players while Murray pretends to be a commentator.

programme.title: Riptide: The Play's The Thing
programme.desc: A string of murders is connected to the search for an undiscovered Shakespeare manuscript and the Riptide agency unhappily teams up with wannabe FBI agent Gloria to find it.

programme.title: Riptide: Dead Men Don't Floss
programme.desc: When an article in a magazine praises Nick for "his" agency, the guys each take a case to see which one is the best detective.

programme.title: Riptide: Chapel Of Glass
programme.desc: As the lieutenant's wedding nears, a case the guys are working on strikes close to home, and may call into question everything she knows.

programme.title: Riptide: If You Can't Beat 'Em, Join 'Em
programme.desc: The Riptide Detective Agency is hired to consult for a new detective television show. The lead actors follow the guys around for over a week while investigating an actual case.

programme.title: Riptide: Echoes
programme.desc: While in a firefight, one of the guys is shot, and the others deal with the repercussions of what had to be done.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Energized
programme.desc: Danielle is helping quite a pair, Joseph is a chiropractor and Nadia is an aerospace engineer. They're looking for a home to start a family. Not only that, they want space to host their extended family. Will it be as difficult as rocket science?

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Fabulous
programme.desc: Janelle and Manuel are young professionals looking for more space. With one child tagging along on the tour already, they need a place for their growing family. They might need to do some renovations, but they want everything to be perfect.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Fun House
programme.desc: These two business owners Joseph and Heather work hard and want to play hard! They're looking for a place to entertain guests, and Daryl's got some amazing homes to show them.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Family Home
programme.desc: Vipin’s family of four are in the market to purchase their own dream home in the Greater Toronto Area.

programme.desc: Phil and Claire, a newly wed couple, are searching for their dream home in Castlemore.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Fabulous Luxury
programme.desc: Elvira and Robert are looking for a home with a history, but want to make sure it is post-renovation.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Modern Resident
programme.desc: Dana and Eric have worked hard building their successful family business, and are finally ready to buy their family's dream home.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Unique Design
programme.desc: With a budget between $5 and $12 million and Real Estate Agent Tav Schembri is up for the challenge.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Remarkable Housing
programme.desc: Young, entrepreneurial couple Jonathan and Kerry want to start a family, and are looking to buy their first family home.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Home or Abroad
programme.desc: Real estate broker Jasmine Xuereb helps home buyers Cindy and Andrew find their dream property.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Private Island
programme.desc: Katerina and Mauricio are looking for one property in Canada and a holiday home in Belize, specifically on a private island.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Fabulous Resort
programme.desc: Fernando and his investment group are looking to either buy or build a resort in Canada or Mexico with the help of Joe Petrella Construction.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Canada or Belize Holiday Dream Home
programme.desc: Real Estate Agents Jasmine Xuereb & Laura Compagni team up to aid power couple Jamie and Jennifer in purchasing either a real estate investment in Canada or Belize.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Central American Dream Home
programme.desc: Homeowners Patricia & Taheer are looking for a change of scenery.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Mexican Sunset
programme.desc: Since working from home has become increasingly popular, Paul and Sonia are entertaining the idea of living and working abroad.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Dream Homes in Dubai
programme.desc: Mike team up once again with local agent to find a unique opportunities for residential investments.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Best of Havana
programme.desc: Marshall and Maria can't decide whether they should buy a property in Canada (Marshall's homeland) or Cuba (Maria's homeland).

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Jasmine's Favourite
programme.desc: Alan & Amber are ready to buy the property of their dreams, and broker Jasmine Xuereb is ready to help!

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Living and Golf
programme.desc: Rick is looking for an investment property in either Canada or abroad.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Spark Investment
programme.desc: Laura aids Nick Regina and Michael Succurro of Spark Financial Group in purchasing a smart property investment.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Pearl Island
programme.desc: Paul and Jane are looking for an extreme luxury property with a lot of privacy.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Mexican Heaven
programme.desc: Tav and Mike team up once again to find unique opportunities in Canada as well villas in Los Cabos, Mexico.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Hotel Vie
programme.desc: Laura Compagni teams up with Mataj Architects and The Parentela Family to introduce the first of the Hotel Vie chain of luxury hotels.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Condo
programme.desc: Downsizing can be a difficult transition & Jin's objective is to make it as seamless as possible. In this episode, Jin is getting outdoors by practicing archery with Mike but mostly just to compete for bragging rights.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: King's Obsession
programme.desc: It is time to upsize! Daryl's client is moving away from downtown Toronto because they desire a bigger space, more privacy, & tranquility.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Rose Garden
programme.desc: Mike's couple is looking for their luxurious dream home anywhere in between Toronto & Barrie near HWY 400 in a prestigious neighborhood. They have a large dog, tall family, & want to start a family of their own.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Smart Investment
programme.desc: An amazing beachfront property is what Inez's couple is looking for & these top million dollar agents are sure to surpass their expectations.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Bucket List
programme.desc: Mike's friend invites him to an Indian wedding & tells him about his uncle who is looking for a luxury condo close to the airport. Daryl, Inez, & Jin support & donate to Mike's charity.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Right Choice
programme.desc: Somewhere to spend the rest of their days surrounded by nature sounds like a paradise to retire in. Daryl & Jin play some golf to discuss a potential listing she has found & Mike aids Inez in purchasing a new vehicle.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Big City Home
programme.desc: A young trendy couple wants to start a family in Toronto but they need some help from these top million dollar agents. Jin is a natural daredevil & has always wanted to skydive with her clients.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: City Dreams
programme.desc: Moving in together can be stressful but fun because you are starting a new life together! Inez's client is selling their separate properties & looking for a house or condo.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Cottage Getaways
programme.desc: Agreeing on a vacation home is made much harder when these top million dollar agents have astounding listings. Mike's client is looking for a waterfront cottage.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Perfect Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Remarrying is hard enough let alone combining two families under one roof. With a total of 4 children between the ages of 7 & 16 Jin's client is definitely going to need lots of space & land in a safe neighborhood.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Now that Kristen & Kane have opened an office in Toronto, they will be travelling a lot from Vancouver & want somewhere of their own to stay in.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Classic Homes Are Timeless
programme.desc: Many people enjoy staying busy & always having a project on the go. Inez's client loves to build & create breathtaking properties. On their next project, this couple wants an interesting property.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Agents of Million Dollar Homes
programme.desc: Deborah & Vezi are an international couple that want to live in Toronto for one year but has no idea where to start looking. Luckily for them Mike, Jin, Daryl, & Inez have teamed up to find them the home of their dreams.

programme.title: JAG: Rendevous
programme.desc: Mac and Harm once again find themselves courtroom adversaries as Mac is assigned the difficult task of defending CPO Holst, an admitted wife abuser accused of murdering his wife's boyfriend.

programme.title: JAG: Ghost Ship
programme.desc: Harm and Mac investigate the discovery of a skeleton found hidden aboard a decommissioned aircraft carrier that is being cut up for scrap, and learn it is all that remains of a long-missing JAG officer.

programme.title: JAG: The Court Martial of Sandra Gilbert
programme.desc: The top female gunship pilot at the Yuma Marine Base is charged with disobeying an order to stop "fraternizing" with her crew chief, a married, enlisted man. Mac is assigned as prosecutor and Harm is set as Susan's defense attorney.
programme.sub-title: The Court Martial of Sandra Gilbert

programme.title: JAG: Vanished
programme.desc: Concerns regarding the mysterious disappearance of a fully armed Navy F-14 during a storm lead Harm's investigation to consider such diverse scenarios as pilot suicide, terrorism, the Bermuda Triangle curse, or UFO interference.

programme.title: JAG: King of the Fleas
programme.desc: Having just stabbed a man on a street-corner, Willie, a wheelchair-bound former Vietnam POW arrives at JAG headquarters to report "a 30-year-old murder" which he's just committed. Willie relates that while imprisoned he knew Harm's father.

programme.title: JAG: Against All Enemies
programme.desc: Harm, Mac and Bud board an aircraft carrier in the Sea of Japan to investigate the accidental shooting down of a North Korean civilian airliner by Navy jets.

programme.title: JAG: Impact
programme.desc: Harm and Bud investigate the crash of a Marine helicopter whose dead pilot is being blamed for the incident. They discover the chopper seems to have been hit by some form of UFO. Government security officials want to maintain a cover-up at all costs.

programme.title: JAG: People V. Rabb
programme.desc: Harm is arrested by the FBI for the murder of Konaplanik, a Russian who was selling Harm supposedly accurate information about his missing father's whereabouts. The killer turns out to be Col. Tomashevsky, a Russian agent.

programme.title: JAG: Defensless
programme.desc: A woman Navy ensign shoots and kills a Turkish colonel; she claims self-defense.

programme.title: JAG: With Intent to Die
programme.desc: With help from Harm, Mac, Harriet, and Bud, Admiral Chedwiggen investigates the apparent suicide of his mentor, Admiral Clancy, who allegedly shot himself while on a hunting trip. Harm and company ultimately uncover who the killer was.

programme.title: JAG: Father's Day
programme.desc: Mac and Harm are assigned the task of defending a young Marine whose frustration at being unable to wrest custody of his son has led to his being court-martialed for dereliction of duty.

programme.title: JAG: Tiger, Tiger
programme.desc: Harm takes Josh on a weekend cruise for Navy families aboard a frigate. When the frigate is taken over by terrorists who intend to fire missiles at Cuba, Harm and Bud take matters into their own hands to stop the evil plot.

programme.title: JAG: Return of Mimmy Blackhorse
programme.desc: An Army forensic pathologist joins forces with Harm, Mac, Bud and Harriet as they try to verify that newly unearthed human remains are those of a heroic Navajo "code-talker" who had been missing since WWII.

programme.title: JAG: The Imposter
programme.desc: Harm is held captive by Palmer, a renegade government agent with whom he had crossed swords a few months ago. While Palmer prepares a life mask so he can pass for Harm, he explains his plans to assassinate the key witness in the trial.

programme.title: JAG: To Russia With Love
programme.desc: With evidence that his missing father could still be alive in, Harm convinces the Admiral to give him time off so he can go to Russia. In Moscow, they are questioned by Mark Falcon, the KGB agent who had stolen a list of POW's earlier from Harm.

programme.title: JAG: Gypsy Eyes
programme.desc: Unable to lose the pursuing Russian fighters, Harm's and Mac’s hijacked Mig is shot out of the sky over Siberia.

programme.title: JAG: Act of Terror
programme.desc: When Arab terrorists attach a mine to a US Navy warship in an attempt to sink it, Marine guards are able to kill one and capture the other, even after the mine explodes, killing two sailors.

programme.title: JAG: The Black Jet
programme.desc: Harm and Mac are sent to Teheran, Iran to represent a Navy flier whose Stealth jet crashed in Iran due to a major mechanical failure.

programme.title: JAG: Silent Service
programme.desc: Mac and Harm are having trouble relating...a result of working together under stress for so long.

programme.title: COPS starts at 9pm
programme.desc: Cops gives viewers access into the daily lives and work of the men and women of law enforcement. Filmed on location, the groundbreaking series follows real officers on patrol as they conduct high-speed pursuits, wild arrests and dangerous police business.

programme.title: COPS starts at 9pm
programme.desc: Cops gives viewers access into the daily lives and work of the men and women of law enforcement. Filmed on location, the groundbreaking series follows real officers on patrol as they conduct high-speed pursuits, wild arrests and dangerous police business.

programme.title: COPS: Cops The Young and the Reckless
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.
programme.sub-title: Cops The Young and the Reckless

programme.title: COPS: An Innocent Gardener
programme.desc: Officers pursue a vehicle that struck a police car. Two men deny the lawnmower in their truck was stolen. Deputies are called when a mother attempts to run her daughter over.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Manic Monday
programme.desc: A wanted man attempts to hide at his grandmother's house, police arrest a suspect driving a stolen vehicle, and officers call animal control for an injured dog.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Mommy's Tears
programme.desc: A suspect collides with another driver while fleeing from police, deputies mediate an altercation over a bag of chips, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS: Get a Room
programme.desc: A man claims to be protecting the car he broke into. Officers are called to when a couple gets too friendly while out in public. Police are dispatched when a drunk woman pounds on her neighbor's door.

programme.title: COPS: Ignorance is an Excuse
programme.desc: Two men engage in a fist fight on the street over an alleged robbery. A couple claim that they didn't know the car they are driving was stolen.

programme.title: COPS: Dine and Flee
programme.desc: A sting operation is set up to catch narcotics dealers. A man flees a restaurant without paying his four-hundred-dollar tab. A traffic stop for a tint violation leads to a felony arrest for narcotics.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Carjacked Up
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspect running down the street with a knife, the driver of a stolen car takes off on foot after he's pulled over, and police find carjacked vehicles.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Bail Me Out, Boss
programme.desc: A distressed woman leads the cops to her abusive fiance, and a couple of officers are suspicious when they pull over an overly friendly man.

programme.title: COPS: The Car is Mine!
programme.desc: A man locks himself in a trunk after deputies respond to a restraining order call. Deputies respond to two women arguing over the ownership of a car.

programme.title: COPS: Cops One, Two, Tree
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit ends abruptly when the suspect makes a wrong turn, and a nervous man attempts to hide his crime when he thinks no one can see him.

programme.title: COPS: Hot Potato
programme.desc: A man tosses his stash after being pulled over. Officers question two men in a fight who live with the same woman. A man says his shorts are from a thrift store after drugs are found in them.

programme.title: COPS: Mamma's House
programme.desc: Deputies search for a man who ran from a traffic stop. A man being pursued tells officers he was going to his mother's house. A drunk driver won't admit to hitting a car.

programme.title: COPS: Multiple Identities
programme.desc: Officers recover a baggie of drugs from a crying suspect. A drunk woman hides a second ID in her back pocket. Police stop a vehicle that hit a patrol car.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: A man refusing to drop his knife tests an officer's patience, neighbors hold an alleged thief until police arrive, and a couple of volatile newlyweds need police intervention.

programme.title: COPS: Rocks in my Socks
programme.desc: Deputies discover a purse and a sock containing paraphernalia during an arrest. Deputies pursue an intoxicated motorcyclist. A woman is suspected of stealing a cake.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: A trespassing man uses his dog as a shield when police arrive at the scene, a stolen tablet leads to a bloody altercation, and kittens run wild in a Florida neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS: Spiked but Still Moving
programme.desc: A suspect refuses to stop his vehicle even after the officers spike his tires. A dispute over money results in a pregnant woman being attacked.

programme.title: COPS: Cops The Blame Game
programme.desc: An arrested man has a long list of instructions for his "bae," and a driver charged with heroin possession claims he was framed by the passenger in his backseat.

programme.title: COPS: Time to Climb
programme.desc: A couple flee a routine traffic stop. An intoxicated woman climbs a tree. Construction workers are pulled over for a hand-to-hand transaction.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Spain Cruise: The Matadors, Mrs. Jameson Comes Out, Love's Labors Found, Marry Me, Marry Me - Part 1

programme.desc: An all-star cast visits beautiful and romantic locales on a cruise to Spain and Portugal. Guest stars include Melissa Sue Anderson, Olivia Brown, Mary Crosby, Lorenzo Lamas, William R. Moses, Cesar Romero, Sada Thompson, and Adrian Zmed.
programme.sub-title: Spain Cruise: The Matadors, Mrs. Jameson Comes Out, Love's Labors Found, Marry Me, Marry Me - Part 2

programme.title: The Love Boat: My Stepmother, Myself, Almost Roommates, Cornerback Sneak
programme.desc: Vicki is upset about her dad's impending marriage and a professional football player tries to save his job when a new woman becomes owner of the team.
programme.sub-title: My Stepmother, Myself, Almost Roommates, Cornerback Sneak

programme.title: The Love Boat: Happily Ever After, Have I Got A Job For You, Mr. Smith Goes To Minikula
programme.desc: Captain Stubing gets cold feet on the eve of his wedding and Gopher gets an offer to manage a tropical resort.
programme.sub-title: Happily Ever After, Have I Got A Job For You, Mr. Smith Goes To Minikula

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Captain & The Lady / One If By Land... / Centerfold
programme.desc: Bonnie Franklin appears as Capt. Stubing's infuriatingly sarcastic ex-wife with her present spouse, the captain's boss.
programme.sub-title: The Captain & The Lady / One If By Land... / Centerfold

programme.title: The Love Boat: Oh, Dale! / The Main Event / A Tasteful Affair
programme.desc: In "Oh, Dale!," John Ritter plays a rejected suitor hot on the trail of the girl he loves, who happens to be a heartless fortune-seeker named Joann (Jennifer Shaw).
programme.sub-title: Oh, Dale! / The Main Event / A Tasteful Affair

programme.title: The Love Boat: Ex Plus Y / Graham And Kelly / Golden Agers
programme.desc: In "Ex Plus Y," newlyweds Terri and Ron Larson (Loretta "M*A*S*H" Swit and Richard "Soap" Mulligan) are adjusting well until Terri encounters ex-husband Barney (Robert Reed) aboard ship with his lady friend.
programme.sub-title: Ex Plus Y / Graham And Kelly / Golden Agers

programme.title: The Love Boat: Message For Maureen / Acapulco Connection / Gotcha
programme.desc: In "Message for Maureen," a famous female tennis pro (Brenda Benet) confined to a wheelchair as the result of a serious accident, finds herself in a relationship with a sports writer (Bill Bixby) who was once her severest critic.
programme.sub-title: Message For Maureen / Acapulco Connection / Gotcha

programme.title: The Love Boat: Help! Murder! / Isaac The Groupie / Mr. Popularity
programme.desc: In "Help, Murder," Denise and Bret (Michele Lee and David Groh) are a married couple getting away from their three kids for the first time.
programme.sub-title: Help! Murder! / Isaac The Groupie / Mr. Popularity

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Joker Is Mild / First Time Out / Take My Granddaughter, Please
programme.desc: In "The Joker is Mild," has-been comedian Barry Keyes (Phil Foster) abuses his family tie with cruise director Julie in an astonishing attempt to make a comeback.
programme.sub-title: The Joker Is Mild / First Time Out / Take My Granddaughter, Please

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Identical Problem / Julie's Old Flame / The Jinx
programme.desc: In "The Identical Problem," twins Helen and Ellen (both played by Diana "Soap" Canova) pretend to be one person, which nearly drives Doc crazy because Helen is warm, Ellen is cold and Doc is feeling amorous.
programme.sub-title: The Identical Problem / Julie's Old Flame / The Jinx

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Understudy / Married Singles / Lost & Found
programme.desc: A boy befriends a couple that recently lost its young son. A trainee schemes to steal Julie's job. A bickering married couple takes the cruise and stays in separate cabins...next door to each other.
programme.sub-title: The Understudy / Married Singles / Lost & Found

programme.title: The Love Boat: Romance Roulette / The Captain's Captain / Dog's Life
programme.desc: The presence of the captain's demanding father leaves the entire crew on edge. A dog traps a passenger in his cabin. Three friends reunite on board the ship and try to meet men through an unusual game. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: Romance Roulette / The Captain's Captain / Dog's Life

programme.title: The Love Boat: Dear Beverly / The Strike / Special Delivery
programme.desc: An advice columnist neglects her husband to devote all her time to her fans, prompting him to seek affection elsewhere. A man with a negative history with Capt. Stubing fills in for the ailing chef.
programme.sub-title: Dear Beverly / The Strike / Special Delivery

programme.title: The Love Boat: Lonely At The Top / Silent Night / Divorce Me, Please
programme.desc: In a Christmas-themed cruise, the captain worries about how to effectively lead his ship but be a friend to his crew as well. A married couple who outwardly appear happy and in love are both desperate for the other person to give them a divorce.
programme.sub-title: Lonely At The Top / Silent Night / Divorce Me, Please

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Old Man And The Runaway / A Fine Romance / The Painters
programme.desc: A crotchety old man and a teenage runaway form an unlikely friendship. Julie grows frustrated when an old friend of her brother's repeatedly rejects her advances without explanation.
programme.sub-title: The Old Man And The Runaway / A Fine Romance / The Painters

programme.title: The Love Boat: Family Reunion / Cinderella Story / Too Hot To Handle
programme.desc: A woman who believes her departed dad was a noble sea captain forms an attachment for a devilish old purser; a newlywed couple are prevented by dislocated backs, sunburn, and even poison ivy from enjoying their honeymoon.
programme.sub-title: Family Reunion / Cinderella Story / Too Hot To Handle

programme.title: Melrose Place: Dead Men Don't Shut Up
programme.desc: Lexi fears that the police will accuse her of killing Tony and forging his signature on the contracts. Terry kidnaps Sarah.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Asses To Ashes
programme.desc: Terry apologizes to Ryan and Megan. Lexi wants to go to the police with Eve's revelations about Amanda.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Pilot
programme.desc: (S01E001 )When Alison's roommate unexpectedly moves out, her "For Rent" ad leads to potential romances, bitter reprisals, and a sexy pool party for the residents of 4616 Melrose Place

programme.title: Melrose Place: Friends And Lovers
programme.desc: Billy and Alison work out the essential boundaries of their new roommate relationship. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Melrose Place: Lost & Found
programme.desc: It's time to read between the lines when Billy entrusts Alison with his particularly bad screenplay, and a daring Jane loses her wedding ring during a wild night at Shooters.

programme.title: Melrose Place: For Love or Money
programme.desc: Alison suspects that Rick, one of the guys from mailroom, is interested in her. Jake takes a job at a coffeehouse, making espresso. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Melrose Place: Leap Of Faith
programme.desc: Jane receives some breathtaking, life-changing information, while Billy attempts a death-defying stunt in order to have an "experience" to write about.

programme.title: Melrose Place: My Way
programme.desc: Appearances can be deceiving when Billy invites Alison to meet his parents in Palm Springs, and Sandy lets a role in a horror movie go to her head.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Second Chance
programme.desc: Rhonda invites Matt to a dance performance that her long-time friend Theresa is in. Jake asks Alison for help in preparing him for his high-school equivalency examination. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Melrose Place: Lonely Hearts
programme.desc: Flirtation turns to frustration when Sandy finds herself being followed by a handsome young man named Paul after a particularly awkward date.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Responsibly Yours
programme.desc: Sticking around for the long haul becomes a test of courage for Billy when he dates a hot single mother, while Jake and Sandy question whether they have more in common than a fondness for sex.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Burned
programme.desc: Rhonda makes it her mission to help Billy after he's attacked in South Central, while Jake has difficulty getting past old wounds when his mother suddenly appears at his birthday.

programme.title: Melrose Place: A Broken Promise
programme.desc: Sometimes bad thing happen to good people, and it's up to a rambunctious puppy and a friendly red-headed medical colleague named Kimberly to remind Jane and Michael what really matters.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Polluted Affairs
programme.desc: Alison dives into a steamy new relationship with a passionate environmentalist, but when she comes up for air, she discovers that he may not be all he seems.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Dreams Come True
programme.desc: Friendly concern is misconstrued as meddling when Billy confronts the married man Alison is seeing and Jake urges Matt to get revenge on the hoodlums that attacked him.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Drawing the Line
programme.desc: The Melrose group faces difficult new beginnings as Keith leaves his wife for Alison, Matt sees a lawyer about his discrimination case, and Rhonda takes on the challenge of finding a new roommate.

programme.title: Melrose Place: House Of God
programme.desc: Silence speaks volumes when an aloof new tenant, Jo Reynolds, moves in, and Jane and Michael suspect that their friend's wife is the victim of domestic abuse.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Whole Truth
programme.desc: Jake and Jo become closer. Michael and Jane are discussing trying to have a baby.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Jake VS Jake
programme.desc: Jake is emotionally unprepared when an old girlfriend announces he has a son, while Alison realizes she needs help in dealing with her serious medical problems.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Singing and Dancing
programme.desc: When Timmy joins an a cappella group, he wants to keep it a secret from Russell. Meanwhile, Jeff and Audrey discover they have a new annoying neighbor.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Anniversary Chicken
programme.desc: When Jeff decides to surprise Audrey by remembering their anniversary, he's the one who ends up being surprised. Meanwhile, Timmy is forced to be Russell's interpreter on a date.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Jeff's Day
programme.desc: When Jeff proclaims it's 'Jeff Day', he gets his way until the cleaning lady arrives. Meanwhile, Adam has to figure out why his eye is twitching.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Zygote
programme.desc: When Jeff and Audrey see a fertility specialist with their surrogate, they discover a zygote. Meanwhile, Russell and Timmy go on double dates again.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: The Set Up
programme.desc: When Russell discovers Timmy has a sister, he aims to impress her. Meanwhile, Jeff and Audrey set their neighbor Liz up on a date.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Beating the System
programme.desc: When Jeff and Audrey learn their surrogate is pregnant, both of their lives change. Meanwhile, Timmy takes on the responsibility of wedding planner for Adam and Jennifer.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: The Jeff Photo
programme.desc: When an old photo of Jeff appears in an art gallery, he decides it's time to make some changes in his life. Meanwhile, Russell experiences a slump with women until he sees a familiar face.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: The Power Couple
programme.desc: Jeff is threatened when Audrey gets a raise and makes almost as much as he does. Meanwhile, Russell enlists Timmy to find out what Liz sees in another man.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Double Down
programme.desc: Jeff and Audrey panic when they are told they might be having twins. Meanwhile, Russell throws a citizenship party for Timmy to impress a girl.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Cheating
programme.desc: Audrey tries to persuade Jeff to eat healthier when he is diagnosed with high cholesterol, but he can’t help sneaking around with Brenda for unhealthy food.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: To try to show his care and interest in their relationship, Jeff sends Audrey on a scavenger hunt, as suggested by Adam. Russell thinks Jennifer has a sex tape and enlists Timmy’s help in finding it.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: The Last of the Red Hat Lovers
programme.desc: Russell books a cruise that he thinks is filled with 'red hot' ladies but instead, it's filled with ladies from the Red Hat society. Meanwhile, Timmy tries to help Jeff and Audrey settle an argument.
programme.sub-title: The Last of the Red Hat Lovers

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Dirty Talk
programme.desc: Russell tries to get out of his marriage to an overly enthused Liz, who tries to make it work, while Jeff attempts to engage Audrey in dirty talk.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Bros Before Nodes
programme.desc: Worried about getting his father's approval, Russell gets Liz all dolled up to meet him.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Audrey Is Dumb
programme.desc: Jeff celebrates Audrey's inability to talk after her node removal surgery. Russell gets Timmy to fire an employee for him, and Adam discovers he's only getting free stuff because of his good looks.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Nature Calls
programme.desc: Everyone spends a weekend in Vermont to watch the leaves change. During the trip, Adam gets poison ivy on his hands, Jeff has an embarrassing experience on the inn's computer, and Liz begins to realize that her marriage is a sham.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Shy Dial
programme.desc: Jeff uses an app on his phone that automatically puts his calls through to Audrey's voicemail. Meanwhile, Adam befriends a clothing salesman who helps him against his friends when he picks up some questionable clothing choices.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Cheating
programme.desc: Audrey tries to persuade Jeff to eat healthier when he is diagnosed with high cholesterol, but he can’t help sneaking around with Brenda for unhealthy food.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: The Chair
programme.desc: Jeff and Audrey engage in a battle of wills when she refuses to admit that she hates the armchair she ordered while Jeff pretends to love it.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: To try to show his care and interest in their relationship, Jeff sends Audrey on a scavenger hunt. Russell thinks Jennifer has a sex tape and enlists Timmy's help in finding it.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: A Big Bust
programme.desc: Audrey believes her maid needs an operation to correct the limp she has to be able to walk better, thinking she is doing the right thing Audrey asks her neighbors to contribute to the cause not having any idea what the money is really intended for.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: After The Lovin'
programme.desc: Frustrated by his boss blaming him for burning his mouth on hot soup, Timmy has a special spoon created for Russell. Audrey's plan backfires when she tries to seduce Jeff in the bedroom in order to get him to complete household tasks.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Missed Connections
programme.desc: Timmy wants to reconnect with a woman he met on the subway; Jeff and Audrey turn on each other when former friends snub them.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: The Five Things
programme.desc: Jeff can't think of five nice things to say about Audrey; Russell encourages Timmy to serenade a woman; Jennifer and Adam mistakenly get Jeff and Audrey's bank statement.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Meat Wars
programme.desc: Audrey drags Jen to a Bon Jovi concert to prove that she's still young and fun, leaving Jeff and Adam at home. Russell finds a phone number in his pocket and asks Timmy to investigate.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Goodbye Dolly
programme.desc: Audrey tries to prepare for motherhood by continuing to repair a doll that she keeps damaging. Meanwhile, Jeff questions whether the very pregnant Brenda should be dating anymore, and Adam tries to convince Jennifer that he is a manly man.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Audrey's Shower
programme.desc: Jen puts the wrong date on the invitations to Audrey's baby shower, Jeff likes Audrey's maternity clothes, and Russell gives up women.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Liz Moves In
programme.desc: Liz temporarily moves in with Jeff and Audrey. Jeff isn't happy with the new guest, but changes his mind when he discovers Liz consistently takes his side against Audrey.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Taking Names
programme.desc: Jeff and Audrey realize that the names on their baby list are also the names of women that Russell has slept with. Adam becomes a cycling enthusiast after Jennifer suggests they start riding bikes in the park.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Cats & Dogs
programme.desc: Feeling lonely after her cat dies, Liz looks for a sperm donor. When Timmy's intellect and innocence don't attract his crush, he tries his hand at playing 'big dog.' Adam rips the vintage wedding dress that Jennifer's family sent her.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Cupcake
programme.desc: Russell gets jealous when Timmy manages to outshine him at his own pick-up game. Adam and Jennifer leave pot-laced cupcakes on the kitchen counter, and an unaware Jeff eats one.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Fountain Of Youth
programme.desc: After meeting up with college friends who are no longer into partying, Jeff and Audrey set out to prove that even with a baby on the way, they can still have fun. Meanwhile, Timmy attempts to find Russell's compassionate side.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Baby Talk
programme.desc: When Audrey bonds with their unborn baby by reading her stories, a paranoid Jeff believes that she is trying to form an alliance against him. Meanwhile, Russell steals an article that Timmy wrote.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Role Play
programme.desc: Jeff promises to take Audrey to an upmarket and very popular restaurant but forgets to book a table. Determined to dine there, he hatches a plan to get in by claiming that a last-minute reservation is needed for a celebrity.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Catering
programme.desc: Brenda enlists Jeff and Audrey's help when she does the catering for an event at Columbia University. While waitressing, Audrey tries to fit in with the guests, only to discover that they are more impressed with Jeff's bartending skills.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Cooking Class
programme.desc: The couples attempt to enjoy recreational cooking classes together, but Jeff and Adam can't keep their competitive nature out of the kitchen. Russell doesn't notice how disturbingly similar his new girlfriend is to Timmy.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Unpleasant Surprises
programme.desc: When Jennifer learns that the guys have nothing planned for Adam's last weekend as a bachelor, she plans a party weekend. Things don't go as planned, however, so Jeff, Russell, and Timmy must improvise.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement: Timmy Quits
programme.desc: Audrey has always had suspicions that Jeff's old college friend Heidi harbours romantic feelings for him, so Jeff invites Heidi over to prove that this was never the case.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Love In Bloom
programme.desc: Valentine’s Day gets complicated when Sabrina learns two boys are vying for her heart.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Welcome Back Duke
programme.desc: Sabrina discovers why the road to ruin is paved with good intentions.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: She’s Baaack!
programme.desc: Cousin Amanda returns to give Sabrina a little competition in the teenage witch -and love-- department.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Wild Wild Witch
programme.desc: The West gets even wilder when Sabrina takes the reins as town sheriff.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Four Faces Of Sabrina
programme.desc: Choosing a college literally tears Sabrina apart when she tries too hard to make everyone happy.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)
programme.desc: After four years of enduring Sabrina’s spells and strange behavior, Harvey finally suspects she is a witch
programme.sub-title: The End Of An Era (Season Finale)

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dreama, The Mouse
programme.desc: Brad’s witch hunting gene goes into overdrive when Sabrina comes down with Spring Fever.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Pilot
programme.desc: Sabrina’s Sweet 16 becomes a truly magical birthday when she discovers she’s a witch.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Bundt Friday
programme.desc: Under the influence of truth sprinkles, Sabrina learns honesty is the best policy.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The True Adventures Of Rudy Kazootie
programme.desc: Big trouble comes in a small package when Sabrina takes a babysitting job.
programme.sub-title: The True Adventures Of Rudy Kazootie

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Terrible Things
programme.desc: Sabrina's good intentions turn bad when she uses her magic to meddle in other people's lives.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: A Halloween Story
programme.desc: Sabrina faces a frightful dilemma when she must be in two places at once for Halloween.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dream Date
programme.desc: Something’s cooking when Aunts Hilda and Zelda use man dough to bake a date for Sabrina.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: 3rd Aunt From The Sun
programme.desc: As fun Aunt Vesta, Raquel Welch shows Sabrina how the Other Realm half live.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Magic Joel
programme.desc: Sabrina’s job as a magician’s assistant is short-lived when she accidentally makes the boss disappear.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Geek Like Me
programme.desc: Popular Libby manages to turn being a geek into a position of power.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sweet N’ Sour Victory
programme.desc: Sabrina casts a spell on herself to become an instant Kung-Fu master.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: A Girl & Her Cat
programme.desc: A Christmas Eve catnapping renews Salem’s love for his family.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Trial By Fury
programme.desc: Sabrina and her aunts use magic to show an unfair teacher that what goes around comes around.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Jenny’s Non-Dream
programme.desc: Behaving as mortals for just one night turns out to be more than the Spellman household can handle.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina Through The Looking Glass
programme.desc: Sabrina's in a foul mood and only baseball great Brady Anderson can help her out of her slump.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Hilda And Zelda: The Teenage Years
programme.desc: Aunts Hilda and Zelda experience growing pains when they turn into teenagers for the night.
programme.sub-title: Hilda And Zelda: The Teenage Years

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Mars Attracts
programme.desc: A winter vacation to Mars and a cute ski instructor test Sabrina’s feelings for Harvey.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: First Kiss
programme.desc: Sabrina’s first kiss becomes a test of true love when Harvey is turned into a frog.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sweet Charity
programme.desc: When Sabrina uses Libby’s likeness to promote a community service program, the real Libby manages to steal the limelight.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Cat Showdown
programme.desc: Salem enters a cat show to make some fast cash, but Sabrina uncovers a fur-raising scandal.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Meeting Dad’s Girlfriend
programme.desc: Love definitely isn’t in the air when Sabrina meets her dad’s new girlfriend.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: As Westbridge Turns
programme.desc: Sinister plots, tumultuous romance, danger, and intrigue – just another day at Westbridge High, after Sabrina casts a spell wishing for more excitement.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Great Mistake
programme.desc: Sabrina finds herself in a little trouble when she sneaks out of the house after being grounded.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Crucible
programme.desc: Sabrina is put on trial for witchcraft when her class visits historical Salem, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Troll Bride
programme.desc: When Sabrina is tricked into marrying a troll, only a prince – a.k.a. Harvey – can save her.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina Gets Her License (Part 1)
programme.desc: Sabrina's 17th birthday turns stressful when she has to start studying for her witch's license.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina Gets Her License (Part 2)
programme.desc: Sabrina learns about the responsibilities that come with using magic when she earns her witch’s learner’s permit.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dummy For Love
programme.desc: Sabrina takes advantage of Vice Principal Kraft’s attraction to Aunt Hilda.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dante’s Inferno
programme.desc: Sabrina learns not to date outside of her realm after a bad evening with a witch boy.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: A Doll’s Story
programme.desc: Babysitting becomes a test of ingenuity when Sabrina’s bratty little cousin turns her into a doll.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Boy
programme.desc: The mysteries of men are revealed when Sabrina poses as a boy to figure out how they think.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: A River Of Candy Corn Runs Through It
programme.desc: Halloween is a scary night indeed when Sabrina and her aunts try to throw a normal party
programme.sub-title: A River Of Candy Corn Runs Through It

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Inna Gadda Sabrina
programme.desc: A time ball sends the town of Westbridge grooving back to the 1960s.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Loves Action Movies
programme.desc: From Polar, to James Bond, to Lethal Weapon, Terry loves action movies and is putting some of the best ones to the test!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Meet the Smiths
programme.desc: Terry finally gets to compare himself to Brad Pitt!! Terry and Larry test 3 scenes from action film Mr. and Mrs. Smith.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Jean Claude Van Schappert
programme.desc: Terry enters the world of Slow-Mo and explosions trying to imitate Jean Claude in Hart Target.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Loves 70’s Cop Shows
programme.desc: Terry travels back in time to the 70’s where he gets to relive his childhood dreams of becoming a 70’s TV cop.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: We Hear Ya
programme.desc: Larry and Terry test several requests from viewers.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: D-Day By Air
programme.desc: Terry goes back to paratrooper school and will see how difficult it was for soldiers engaging the enemy while parachuting down to safety on D-Day.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: A Pirate’s Life for Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry go on a swashbuckling adventure when they test two scenes from the 1920’s film, The Black Pirate starring Douglas Fairbanks, Senior.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Nobody
programme.desc: We’re putting the action-packed film Nobody to the test. Booby Traps, Claymores and Riot shields make for an interesting day at the range.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Down Under
programme.desc: Terry and Larry start off the new season testing one of the most requested films, Quigley Down Under.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Paint Your Red River Stagecoach at High Noon
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will test different famous shots from westerns. Can you shoot a cowboy hat off the bad guy?
programme.sub-title: Paint Your Red River Stagecoach at High Noon

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Larry's Shadow
programme.desc: Larry gets sucked into Terry’s dark and mysterious world because Terry wants to test 2 scenes from the 1994 film with Alec Baldwin, The Shadow.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Just-Terry-Fied
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be test 2 scenes from Justified where, Terry finds himself in a bathtub and a dead body lying over top of him.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Last Crusade of Indiana Terry
programme.desc: Terry channels his inner Dr. Jones and tests 1 scene from Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade containing 3 different tests.
programme.sub-title: The Last Crusade of Indiana Terry

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: All for One!
programme.desc: Terry travels back in time to see if he can make it as a Three Musketeer! Can he throw his sword and kill the enemy?

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Nightmare on Hollywood Weapons
programme.desc: Terry and Larry get to test several scenes from Horror films!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Loves Superheros
programme.desc: Holy Hollywood Weapons! Terry and Larry put some of your favorite Superhero’s to the test. Tune in to the same Bat Outdoor Channel for the results!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Alone at Home
programme.desc: Who left Terry Home Alone! Larry did. Terry and Larry test several scenes from the classic film series Home Alone.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry’s Underworld
programme.desc: Terry and Larry are going to test a famous scene from Underworld with Kate Beckensale.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry vs. Gorn
programme.desc: Captain James T Kirk’s battle with the Gorn alien is one of the most popular episodes from the original series.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: McSchappert
programme.desc: What can Terry do with just a paperclip? Probably nothing, but Larry and Terry will test several scenes from MacGyver.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Bond-ing with Larry
programme.desc: Who is the greatest international action hero of all time, Terry Schappert?

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry's Criminal Minds
programme.desc: A murderer tries to kill his final victim as the car they are in slowly sinks to the bottom of a lake.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Silencing Terry
programme.desc: Terry wants to demonstrate how Hollywood has used different objects to silence a gunshot.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Equalizing Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will test 3 scenes from Denzel Washington’s Equalizer films. Can Terry be as cool as Denzel?

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Getting to Know Rick O'Shea
programme.desc: In this episode we get know Larry’s friend Rick O’Shea (Ricochet).

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Dying Hard
programme.desc: John McLain (Bruce Willis) finds himself dangling from the side of a building.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Good, The Bad and Terry
programme.desc: In this classic western, Clint Eastwood – aka “Blondie” – saves Eli Wallach from the hangman’s noose.
programme.sub-title: The Good, The Bad and Terry

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Shark Go Boom
programme.desc: In this iconic scene, Chief Brody hangs on to his sinking boat as a giant shark approaches him with a scuba tank lodged in its mouth.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Breaking Terry Badly
programme.desc: Terry falls victim to Walter White in Breaking Bad, and Terry and Larry test 3 separate scenes from this iconic series.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Down Mexico Way
programme.desc: Don't mess with organized crime. The dynamic duo tackle scenes from the Mexico cartel series Queen of the South.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Saving Private Terry
programme.desc: Terry gets to relive part of his military carrier by attempting the famous sniper shot from Saving Private Ryan.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry's Brave Heart
programme.desc: Terry gets to annoy Larry with his impersonation of William Wallace from Braveheart.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Schappert Identity
programme.desc: Terry channels his inner Jason Bourne to test some of the best moments from the series of films.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry's Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Terry and Larry tackle the epic Lethal Weapon series testing 4 different scenes.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry and The Minigun
programme.desc: Can you really fire a GE Minigun handheld with ammunition held in a backpack (also seen on Captain America: Winter Soldier).

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Pay Terry Back
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test 2 scenes from Mel Gibson’s film Payback. Mel's character is in the back of a taxi when 4 bad guys pull up next to him in an SUV.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Terry Reacher
programme.desc: We’re putting Jack Reacher to the test! The movie, the series, and the pie!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: The Harder Terry Falls
programme.desc: Dust off your chaps as Terry tests several things from the epic western The Harder They Fall, and a canteen buster test from Gunsmoke!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Ex-Men: The Origin of Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a famous scene from X-men. They are attempting to see if you can split a bullet with a Katana sword.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Schapbo
programme.desc: John Rambo’s ability to decimate enemies all by himself has created some of the most incredible weapon stunts in Hollywood history.

programme.desc: Watch all the death-defying battles, amazing competitions and ruthless gameplay on MTV's The Challenge, where competitors deal with hell on earth—and each other—to win big bucks.

programme.title: The Challenge: Diving In
programme.desc: The teams dive out of their comfort zones in Deep Blue, and alliances are tested when the weaker teams attempt to take out a top team in deliberation.

programme.title: The Challenge: Kenny and Tina's Triumph
programme.desc: The battle for immunity is at an all-time high when the players navigate a tough obstacle course, and then shock and awe abound when the Exile ends in a surprise.

programme.title: The Challenge: And The Winners Are...
programme.desc: The remaining three teams compete in an intense final challenge for a chance to take home $250,000.

programme.title: The Challenge: Welcome to Brazil, Pt. 1
programme.desc: The contestants arrive in Brazil and learn the rules of the game, then TJ tests their strength and endurance in the Reachin' Out challenge, and two guys are selected for The Duel.

programme.title: The Challenge: Welcome to Brazil, Pt. 2
programme.desc: The first guy heads home after losing the I Can duel, the players get down and dirty in the Ring Toss challenge, and one contender overcomes a fear before another jeopardizes her own future.

programme.title: The Challenge: Goodbye, Tina and Tyler
programme.desc: A player's temper gets the best of her, the men and women partner up for the Pass with Care challenge, and two guys face off in the Ascender duel before one of them is sent packing.

programme.title: The Challenge: Paula vs. Aneesa
programme.desc: The competitors hold nothing back in the Roller Derby challenge, and two women must prove who wants it more as they hold on for dear life in the Pole Wrestle duel.

programme.title: The Challenge: The Drama Mafia
programme.desc: The players go head-to-head during the Push Over challenge, two guys face off in the Ascender duel, and one person threatens an alliance while forming one of their own.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The players capture flags in a high-stakes game of Flying Leap, a woman is sent home after a loss in the Pole Wrestle duel, and one competitor questions another person's intentions.

programme.title: The Challenge: Nehemiah's Last Day
programme.desc: Players become increasingly paranoid about being eliminated, the men and women partner up for a game of Throwback, and two guys have a betting war as they face off in the I Can duel.

programme.title: The Challenge: What Goes Around Comes Around
programme.desc: The players compete in the Rafty Race challenge, two women go head-to-head in an exhausting game of Push Me in The Duel, and a contender worries about her alliance's dwindling numbers.

programme.title: The Challenge: Until Next Time, Derrick
programme.desc: The players face off in a slippery Pole Dance challenge, two guys compete in a brutal round of Pole Wrestle in The Duel, and a competitor has a breakdown.

programme.title: The Challenge: Harsh Words
programme.desc: One person makes closed-minded comments about a competitor's identity, the players endure an eating contest and race during Dine-n-Dash, and two women face off in the Ascender duel.

programme.title: The Challenge: Friend or Foe?
programme.desc: The men and women partner up in the Stacking Stairs challenge, two friends compete in the Pole Wrestle duel, and a player moves in for a highly anticipated first kiss.

programme.title: The Challenge: Two for Two
programme.desc: The players go head-to-head in the Ice Breakers challenge, and one competitor is determined to step up her game as two women put their strength to the test in the Push Me duel.

programme.title: The Challenge: Fallen Alliances
programme.desc: The men and women team up for the difficult Sunken Treasure challenge, two guys go at it in the Ascender duel, and one player feels used by another competitor.

programme.title: The Challenge: The Big Split
programme.desc: The competitors must collect flags as they circle a 40-foot truss in the Around the Block challenge, a player goes back on her word, and two women head to The Duel to play I Can.

programme.title: The Challenge: The Final Four
programme.desc: The remaining players compete in Paddle Me, which guarantees two people a spot in the finals, and a double duel night of Push Me and I Can determines the other two contenders left standing.
