programme.title: Captain Harlock: Advance On the Mystery Planet
programme.desc: Believing that all the jungles of Earth are inhabited by the Mazone, Harlock decides to return to the Pirate Island.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: When Lola Shines Golden
programme.desc: The Arcadia successfully makes its way to Venus.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Mother, Be Eternal
programme.desc: Tadashi is upset at himself for talking about the Arcadia to Lola.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Castle of Evil in the Sea of Death
programme.desc: The Arcadia heads back to Earth to investigate a third signal being emitted from the Sargasso Sea.
programme.sub-title: The Castle of Evil in the Sea of Death

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Mausoleum of the Sphinx
programme.desc: Commander Kiruta takes Mayu with him. Desperate to find her, Harlock receives a message from Commander Kiruta.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Tragic Love! the Northern Pole Aurora
programme.desc: The Arcadia is at the north pole after spotting an aurora that closely resembles a runway.
programme.sub-title: Tragic Love! the Northern Pole Aurora

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Kei - A Farewell Song
programme.desc: The operator, Kei Yuki, goes to visit her parents' grave.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Skeleton Hero
programme.desc: Upon finding a message in a bottle floating in space that contains an SOS message from Captain Yamanaka of the Braves.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Evil Shadow Soldiers
programme.desc: A group of Mazone suddenly appear in the ship.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Queen Lafresias Trap
programme.desc: There are supposed to be forty-two crewman aboard the Arcadia.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Extinct Planet Jura
programme.desc: Miime's old planet is named Jura, and it was once devastated by a nuclear attack.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Gohrum! the Tragic Soldier
programme.desc: An asteroid belt hits the Arcadia.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Space Graveyard: Deathshadow
programme.desc: Upon returning to Deathshadow Island with the memory device left behind by Zol, Harlock and his crew learn something huge about Queen Lafresia's flagship.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Yattaran, Song of a Plastic Model Fanatic
programme.desc: Upon victory, Harlock orders First mate Yattaran to secure the hostages.
programme.sub-title: Yattaran, Song of a Plastic Model Fanatic

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Shooting Star of Pure Love
programme.desc: A surprising couple, Zorba, the son of the warrior Zol, and a Mazone medic named Lucia, escaped from the Mazone fleet.
programme.sub-title: The Shooting Star of Pure Love

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Dr. Zero and Mii
programme.desc: Doctor Zero becomes extremely resentful over Zorba and Lucia's murder.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: A Long Way Away Voyage
programme.desc: Due to Harlock's unrelenting resistance, there is a growing resentment between the Mazone military and its civilians.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Will of the Arcadia
programme.desc: Having a hunch as to the reason why Harlock so staunchly opposes them, Queen Lafresia sends someone on a mission to Earth to find out why.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Ulysses Nebula
programme.desc: In order to rescue Mayu, Harlock allows the will of the ship to choose its own course.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Life-and-Death Struggle On the Rainbow Planet
programme.desc: The Mazone come attacking the Arcadia which has had too much free time lately.
programme.sub-title: The Life-and-Death Struggle On the Rainbow Planet

programme.title: Captain Harlock: My Friend, My Youth
programme.desc: While the Arcadia is being repaired at the dock of a Pirate Island, Tadashi and Tori-san come back with a pair of glasses.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Arcadia: The Secret Story of Its Construction
programme.desc: The Arcadia is rapidly being repaired on a Pirate Island while Lafresia continues her bloodthirsty hunt for it.
programme.sub-title: Arcadia: The Secret Story of Its Construction

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Call of the Star Flute
programme.desc: The Mazone plot to use Mayu to lure Harlock and the Arcadia to the Wind Planet and then attack with a powerful mine.
programme.sub-title: The Call of the Star Flute

programme.title: Captain Harlock: A Lone Man's Charge
programme.desc: Commander Kiruta learns of the existence of the Mazone and persistently tries to inform the Prime Minister of the impending doom.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: A Galactic Lullaby
programme.desc: The Arcadia is trapped due to an artificial gravity device.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Beautiful Mysterious Woman
programme.desc: After rescuing Mayu, all that remains is the final showdown with Lafresia.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Eve of the Showdown
programme.desc: The beautiful, dazzling Shizuka Namino becomes a bit of a celebrity on board the Arcadia after being rescued.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Tears On a Red Sweater
programme.desc: Upon realizing that Harlock knew who Shizuka's real identity is, she deems that she has failed in her mission.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Farewell! Mayu
programme.desc: The invasion Mazone forces finally begin their attack on Earth.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Heroic! The Commander Dies
programme.desc: The Arcadia leaves for space with Kiruta on board, after he was injured while trying to save Mayu.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Then, The Angels Sang
programme.desc: After a bunch of skirmishes, the true battle finally begins.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Duel! The Queen VS. Harlock
programme.desc: Making its way past countless gunshots, the Arcadia finally arrives at Queen Lafresia's flagship.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Farewell, Space Outlaw
programme.desc: Harlock and his crew go for their triumphant return to Earth, but, all that awaits them is an order that they've been banished from Earth.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: Departure Ballad
programme.desc: On the road to Megalopolis, Tetsuro is encountered by Count Mecha and watches as his mother is killed.

programme.title: Galaxy Express 999: The Red Winds of Mars
programme.desc: The capital of Mars, Great Syrtis. It is a deserted planet with nothing but the blowing of the red winds.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: While preparing for a gruelling trip, Steve faces a malfunctioning clutch.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Breakdowns and engine problems push Steve behind schedule in the Outback.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Jeff is confronted with a heavy storm while on the road in Tasmania.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Jeff faces a treacherous pass in wet conditions.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Anthony and Danielle have an urgent water-drilling job to replace a collapsed well.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Robbie prepares for the biggest house move in the family's career.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Mick transports a curious giraffe through Sydney traffic.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Extreme weather creates tough conditions for Mark in Micronesia.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Brad moves a road-building camp deep in the Outback.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Robbie's crew faces a difficult job transporting a large home in dangerous conditions.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: There's a rough ride for Steve as he travels from Perth into the red heart of Australia.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Nick and Jo risk one last supply to a remote settlement as the wet season looms.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Robbie and Ashleigh hit house removal hell on a mud-bogged mission out of Brisbane.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame and his faithful canine companion Bella take a monster load cross-country.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Sludge wrestles flooded roads to deliver fuel to farmers.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Yogi risks a showdown with the law as he heads into south Australia.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Yogi prepares for a showdown with transport police in South Australia.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A Perth heavy haulage crew moves a huge pedestrian bridge.

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers

programme.title: NEW: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A leaky fridge halts Woody's urgent frozen food delivery.

programme.title: StarTalk: Down to a Science
programme.desc: The famed astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson teams up with notable experts to spotlight the most pressing topics that face society. Join them for cosmic perspectives about our planet, economic and political events, and innovations that impact.
programme.sub-title: StarTalk Down to a Science Season 1 Marathon II

programme.title: StarTalk Cosmic Queries
programme.desc: Renowned astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson and other top science minds take on fan questions about life and the universe; uncovering a new mind-bending topic each season, from space and physics to nature and more.
programme.sub-title: StarTalk Cosmic Queries Season 2 Marathon pt III

programme.title: StarTalk Things You Thought You Knew
programme.desc: Class is now in session. Go back to school with your personal astrophysicist, Neil deGrasse Tyson, in this special marathon that explores everyday scientific topics from airplanes and telescopes to wind and space.
programme.sub-title: Things you thought you knew S1 back to school special

programme.title: StarTalk Cosmic Queries
programme.desc: Join Dr. Arielle Johnson, Neil deGrasse Tyson, and a co-host as they discuss fermentation and how it works.

programme.title: StarTalk Cosmic Queries
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson and a panel of co-hosts and experts talk all about data science and machine learning.
programme.sub-title: Rise of the Machines with Matt Ginsberg

programme.title: StarTalk With Neil deGrasse Tyson
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson, Gary O'Reilly and Chuck Nice investigate the use of AI and machine learning to predict and understand sports with mathematician and author Matt Ginsberg.

programme.title: StarTalk Things You Thought You Knew
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson explains scientific wonders.
programme.sub-title: StarTalk Things You Thought You Knew Season 1 Mini-Marathon

programme.title: Sister, Sister: The Concert
programme.desc: After their parents forbid them to attend a rap concert, the twins sneak out of the house to meet their idol anyway.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Hair Today
programme.desc: Tamera's glamorous new look gets her into a snobby clique -- but threatens her relationship with Tia, who's been snubbed by the same crowd.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Get a Job
programme.desc: Bored with their jobs at Ray's limousine company, the twins secretly start working at a burger stand and quickly learn the perils of trying to be in two places at the same time.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Joeys Choice
programme.desc: Tia and Tamera face "double trouble" when the same guy unknowingly asks them both out on the same date!

programme.title: Sister, Sister: A Tall Tale
programme.desc: Prom night could wind up being a date with disaster when Tia and Tamera's escorts behave badly, and Roger's date towers over him.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Its a Love Thang
programme.desc: Love is in the air when Tamera, Lisa, and Ray all have close encounters of the romantic kind.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Free Billy
programme.desc: Tia and Tamera rescue a pig who's being mistreated by its owner and attempt to secretly stash the "porker" at home.

programme.title: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: While recovering from "twin appendectomies," Tia and Tamera go in search of hospital records that could reveal the identities of their biological parents.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Tattoo
programme.desc: When Lisa forbids Tia to see her boyfriend Michael, Tamera acts as a go-between for the couple -- but finds herself falling for him.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Two for the Road
programme.desc: Tia and Tamera take their sisterly bond a little too far when they collide with each other's cars while learning to drive.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Its A Party Thang
programme.desc: When the "cool crowd" doesn't invite Tia and Tamera to their "happening" party, the twins decide to throw a bash of their own -- which could wind up being a "bust"!

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Field Trip
programme.desc: A class field trip to a museum lands the twins in detention, while Roger "borrows" a statue that makes him irresistible to women.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Put to the Test
programme.desc: When Tia and Tamera's SAT scores come in, A-student Tia is stunned to discover that Tamera has pulled a higher score than she has.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Kid in Play
programme.desc: After Tamera wins the lead in the school play, she transforms from a calm high school student into the ultimate "drama diva," who's driving everyone -- particularly Tia -- crazy.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Dream Lover
programme.desc: When Tia confides in Tamera that she dreamed of kissing "Stinky Steve," their boss at Rocket Burger, Steve mistakenly believes she's got "the hots" for him.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Scrambled Eggs
programme.desc: A school project in which Tia and Tamera "marry" Michael and Roger proves to be an eye-opening experience for the twins.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Smoking in the Girls Room
programme.desc: Tia and Tamera have a new "burning passion" -- for cigarettes.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Playing Hooky

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Single White Teenager
programme.desc: When Tia's out sick from school, Tamera befriends a new girl who becomes obsessed with looking and acting like the twins.

programme.title: Sister, Sister: I Do?

programme.title: Sister, Sister: The Natural

programme.title: Sister, Sister: The Break-Up

programme.title: Sister, Sister: History A La Cart
programme.desc: An embarrassing arrest from his college days comes back to haunt Ray, and Lisa turns an inheritance into a shopping spree

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Grandpa Campbell

programme.title: Sister, Sister: Halloween

programme.desc: While volunteering at a local retirement home, Tamera becomes determined to help a grumpy old man find happiness again.
